   224	
   225	# Compose human-readable report
   226	{
   227	  echo "# TB-C0 Constitution Gate Report"
   228	  echo
   229	  echo "**Generated**: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
   230	  echo "**Commit**:    $(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"
   231	  echo "**Branch**:    $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:5103:- A4 (post-A3): decomposed metrics — `hit_max_tx`, `tactic_diversity`, `verifier_wait_ms` added as non-Optional v2 fields + `compute_tactic_diversity` helper; per-row decomposition of `solve_rate` / `tokens_per_solve` / `time_per_solve` (all derivable from existing `progress` / `total_run_token_count` / `total_wall_time_ms`). FC-trace: FC2-N22 (HALT decomposition for `hit_max_tx`) + FC1-N11 (∏p decision diversity for `tactic_diversity`) + FC1-N12 (oracle scope for `verifier_wait_ms`).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:5107:- A8e4 (post-A8e3, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-4 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini PASS — split verdict, conservative merge wins per memory `feedback_dual_audit_conflict`): three narrow documentary defects Codex found in the packet itself. **I1** packet title + date: "round 2" → "running through rounds 1–N" (cumulative, with reader pointer to most-recent round section). **I2** per-atom Trust Root deltas in § 3: A5 25→26 → 26→27, A6 26→27 → 27→28, A7 27→30 → 28→31 (all corrected to match the chain in `genesis_payload.toml` header — round-1 packet undercounted because A3's `agent_models.rs` had already raised the count to 26 before A5 landed); TRACE_MATRIX § 1 line 11 anchor-site location: "Six anchor sites wired in `run_swarm`" → "Six anchor sites wired (5 in `run_swarm` + 1 in `run_oneshot`)" — same in § 5 item 7 closure note. **I3** `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` file header docstring: "if not, it skips with a clear diagnostic" → "if not, it FAILS CLOSED with a clear diagnostic" (A8e3 H6 fixed the runtime but left the docstring stale; Codex R4#3 caught the contradiction). Trust Root manifest unchanged at 34 (only re-hash of the wrapper). No source-code defects, no architectural changes; this round is purely documentary alignment.
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:5110:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:8001:   119	- A3 agent_models.rs → 26
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:8027:    21	- **F5** Trust Root count + header reconciled: actual 31 entries → 33 after A8e (was off-by-1 because `agent_models.rs` from A3 was already in TR before A1). Closes Codex#5.
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:8062:    56	- (RQ8) Verify G3: re-count `genesis_payload.toml` `[trust_root]` entries (expect 34) and check TRACE_MATRIX_v2 manifest milestones list matches A0=24 → A1=25 → A3=26 → A5=27 → A6=28 → A7=31 → A8e=33 → A8e2=34.
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:8129:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:16:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:4601:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:12860:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:22:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

(A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5273:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:7767:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:8129:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:16:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5274:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:7769:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:8143:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:13:- A8e4 (post-A8e3, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-4 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini PASS — split verdict, conservative merge wins per memory `feedback_dual_audit_conflict`): three narrow documentary defects Codex found in the packet itself. **I1** packet title + date: "round 2" → "running through rounds 1–N" (cumulative, with reader pointer to most-recent round section). **I2** per-atom Trust Root deltas in § 3: A5 25→26 → 26→27, A6 26→27 → 27→28, A7 27→30 → 28→31 (all corrected to match the chain in `genesis_payload.toml` header — round-1 packet undercounted because A3's `agent_models.rs` had already raised the count to 26 before A5 landed); TRACE_MATRIX § 1 line 11 anchor-site location: "Six anchor sites wired in `run_swarm`" → "Six anchor sites wired (5 in `run_swarm` + 1 in `run_oneshot`)" — same in § 5 item 7 closure note. **I3** `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` file header docstring: "if not, it skips with a clear diagnostic" → "if not, it FAILS CLOSED with a clear diagnostic" (A8e3 H6 fixed the runtime but left the docstring stale; Codex R4#3 caught the contradiction). Trust Root manifest unchanged at 34 (only re-hash of the wrapper). No source-code defects, no architectural changes; this round is purely documentary alignment.

A8e2 adds `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` to TR, raising the count to 34.)
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5527:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:9114:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:5109:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5536:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:9123:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:5409:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:15:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5644:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:9914:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:9339:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:14:- A8e4 (post-A8e3, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-4 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini PASS — split verdict, conservative merge wins per memory `feedback_dual_audit_conflict`): three narrow documentary defects Codex found in the packet itself. **I1** packet title + date: "round 2" → "running through rounds 1–N" (cumulative, with reader pointer to most-recent round section). **I2** per-atom Trust Root deltas in § 3: A5 25→26 → 26→27, A6 26→27 → 27→28, A7 27→30 → 28→31 (all corrected to match the chain in `genesis_payload.toml` header — round-1 packet undercounted because A3's `agent_models.rs` had already raised the count to 26 before A5 landed); TRACE_MATRIX § 1 line 11 anchor-site location: "Six anchor sites wired in `run_swarm`" → "Six anchor sites wired (5 in `run_swarm` + 1 in `run_oneshot`)" — same in § 5 item 7 closure note. **I3** `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` file header docstring: "if not, it skips with a clear diagnostic" → "if not, it FAILS CLOSED with a clear diagnostic" (A8e3 H6 fixed the runtime but left the docstring stale; Codex R4#3 caught the contradiction). Trust Root manifest unchanged at 34 (only re-hash of the wrapper). No source-code defects, no architectural changes; this round is purely documentary alignment.

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R1.md:3942:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:10:- A5 (post-A4): per-agent budget normalization — new `budget_regime` module (`BUDGET_REGIME` + `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env vars; 4-variant enum; pure parser + scaler + env-coupled resolver); `budget_regime` + `budget_max_transactions` added as non-Optional v2 fields on `RunAggregate` and the legacy `PputResult`; loop bound at `run_swarm` switched from hardcoded `let max_transactions = 200` to `resolve_budget(n_agents)` — default (env unset) preserves Phase B baseline (`total_proposal × 200`) bit-for-bit. handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R8.md:5408:- A8e4 (post-A8e3, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-4 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini PASS — split verdict, conservative merge wins per memory `feedback_dual_audit_conflict`): three narrow documentary defects Codex found in the packet itself. **I1** packet title + date: "round 2" → "running through rounds 1–N" (cumulative, with reader pointer to most-recent round section). **I2** per-atom Trust Root deltas in § 3: A5 25→26 → 26→27, A6 26→27 → 27→28, A7 27→30 → 28→31 (all corrected to match the chain in `genesis_payload.toml` header — round-1 packet undercounted because A3's `agent_models.rs` had already raised the count to 26 before A5 landed); TRACE_MATRIX § 1 line 11 anchor-site location: "Six anchor sites wired in `run_swarm`" → "Six anchor sites wired (5 in `run_swarm` + 1 in `run_oneshot`)" — same in § 5 item 7 closure note. **I3** `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` file header docstring: "if not, it skips with a clear diagnostic" → "if not, it FAILS CLOSED with a clear diagnostic" (A8e3 H6 fixed the runtime but left the docstring stale; Codex R4#3 caught the contradiction). Trust Root manifest unchanged at 34 (only re-hash of the wrapper). No source-code defects, no architectural changes; this round is purely documentary alignment.
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R8.md:5411:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R8.md:5441:## § 2. New code symbols (Phase A0–A3)

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R8.md:5713:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:10:- A5 (post-A4): per-agent budget normalization — new `budget_regime` module (`BUDGET_REGIME` + `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env vars; 4-variant enum; pure parser + scaler + env-coupled resolver); `budget_regime` + `budget_max_transactions` added as non-Optional v2 fields on `RunAggregate` and the legacy `PputResult`; loop bound at `run_swarm` switched from hardcoded `let max_transactions = 200` to `resolve_budget(n_agents)` — default (env unset) preserves Phase B baseline (`total_proposal × 200`) bit-for-bit. Trust Root manifest unchanged at 34 (only re-hash of the wrapper). No source-code defects, no architectural changes; this round is purely documentary alignment.
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R7.md:6381:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:19:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

FC-trace: FC2-N22 (HALT decomposition for `hit_max_tx`) + FC1-N11 (∏p decision diversity for `tactic_diversity`) + FC1-N12 (oracle scope for `verifier_wait_ms`).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:5608:- A5 (post-A4): per-agent budget normalization — new `budget_regime` module (`BUDGET_REGIME` + `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env vars; 4-variant enum; pure parser + scaler + env-coupled resolver); `budget_regime` + `budget_max_transactions` added as non-Optional v2 fields on `RunAggregate` and the legacy `PputResult`; loop bound at `run_swarm` switched from hardcoded `let max_transactions = 200` to `resolve_budget(n_agents)` — default (env unset) preserves Phase B baseline (`total_proposal × 200`) bit-for-bit. PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer § 3 condition 3 satisfied: `MaxTxExhausted` rows now disambiguated across N values. handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:5625:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

(A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:10108:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:6752:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:16:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:10374:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R8.md:5401:- A5 (post-A4): per-agent budget normalization — new `budget_regime` module (`BUDGET_REGIME` + `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env vars; 4-variant enum; pure parser + scaler + env-coupled resolver); `budget_regime` + `budget_max_transactions` added as non-Optional v2 fields on `RunAggregate` and the legacy `PputResult`; loop bound at `run_swarm` switched from hardcoded `let max_transactions = 200` to `resolve_budget(n_agents)` — default (env unset) preserves Phase B baseline (`total_proposal × 200`) bit-for-bit. PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer § 3 condition 3 satisfied: `MaxTxExhausted` rows now disambiguated across N values. FC-trace: FC2-N22 (HALT decomposition by budget regime) + FC1-N7 (δ instances determining the per-agent share under PerAgent regime). Trust Root manifest 26 → 27 (corrected A8e5 J4 — the A1 PREREG amendment had taken the count to 25, A3's `agent_models.rs` to 26 before A5 landed; round-1 packet undercounted by 1).

(A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:10881:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R12.md:5562:- A5 (post-A4): per-agent budget normalization — new `budget_regime` module (`BUDGET_REGIME` + `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env vars; 4-variant enum; pure parser + scaler + env-coupled resolver); `budget_regime` + `budget_max_transactions` added as non-Optional v2 fields on `RunAggregate` and the legacy `PputResult`; loop bound at `run_swarm` switched from hardcoded `let max_transactions = 200` to `resolve_budget(n_agents)` — default (env unset) preserves Phase B baseline (`total_proposal × 200`) bit-for-bit. PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer § 3 condition 3 satisfied: `MaxTxExhausted` rows now disambiguated across N values. FC-trace: FC2-N22 (HALT decomposition by budget regime) + FC1-N7 (δ instances determining the per-agent share under PerAgent regime). Trust Root manifest 26 → 27 (corrected A8e5 J4 — the A1 PREREG amendment had taken the count to 25, A3's `agent_models.rs` to 26 before A5 landed; round-1 packet undercounted by 1).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:11110:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:6054:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:7898:    16	- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:11166:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:6628:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:5139:- A5 (post-A4): per-agent budget normalization — new `budget_regime` module (`BUDGET_REGIME` + `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env vars; 4-variant enum; pure parser + scaler + env-coupled resolver); `budget_regime` + `budget_max_transactions` added as non-Optional v2 fields on `RunAggregate` and the legacy `PputResult`; loop bound at `run_swarm` switched from hardcoded `let max_transactions = 200` to `resolve_budget(n_agents)` — default (env unset) preserves Phase B baseline (`total_proposal × 200`) bit-for-bit. PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer § 3 condition 3 satisfied: `MaxTxExhausted` rows now disambiguated across N values. FC-trace: FC2-N22 (HALT decomposition by budget regime) + FC1-N7 (δ instances determining the per-agent share under PerAgent regime). Trust Root manifest 26 → 27 (corrected A8e5 J4 — the A1 PREREG amendment had taken the count to 25, A3's `agent_models.rs` to 26 before A5 landed; round-1 packet undercounted by 1).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:11286:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:9972:    10	- A5 (post-A4): per-agent budget normalization — new `budget_regime` module (`BUDGET_REGIME` + `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env vars; 4-variant enum; pure parser + scaler + env-coupled resolver); `budget_regime` + `budget_max_transactions` added as non-Optional v2 fields on `RunAggregate` and the legacy `PputResult`; loop bound at `run_swarm` switched from hardcoded `let max_transactions = 200` to `resolve_budget(n_agents)` — default (env unset) preserves Phase B baseline (`total_proposal × 200`) bit-for-bit. PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer § 3 condition 3 satisfied: `MaxTxExhausted` rows now disambiguated across N values. FC-trace: FC2-N22 (HALT decomposition by budget regime) + FC1-N7 (δ instances determining the per-agent share under PerAgent regime). Trust Root manifest 26 → 27 (corrected A8e5 J4 — the A1 PREREG amendment had taken the count to 25, A3's `agent_models.rs` to 26 before A5 landed; round-1 packet undercounted by 1).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:11287:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:9979:    17	- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

(A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

(A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:11895:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:7600:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:8213:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R8.md:5401:- A5 (post-A4): per-agent budget normalization — new `budget_regime` module (`BUDGET_REGIME` + `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env vars; 4-variant enum; pure parser + scaler + env-coupled resolver); `budget_regime` + `budget_max_transactions` added as non-Optional v2 fields on `RunAggregate` and the legacy `PputResult`; loop bound at `run_swarm` switched from hardcoded `let max_transactions = 200` to `resolve_budget(n_agents)` — default (env unset) preserves Phase B baseline (`total_proposal × 200`) bit-for-bit. PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer § 3 condition 3 satisfied: `MaxTxExhausted` rows now disambiguated across N values. FC-trace: FC2-N22 (HALT decomposition by budget regime) + FC1-N7 (δ instances determining the per-agent share under PerAgent regime). Trust Root manifest 26 → 27 (corrected A8e5 J4 — the A1 PREREG amendment had taken the count to 25, A3's `agent_models.rs` to 26 before A5 landed; round-1 packet undercounted by 1).

(A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:11926:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:7993:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:8724:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R7.md:6381:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:19:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:11954:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:8398:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:6628:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:5139:- A5 (post-A4): per-agent budget normalization — new `budget_regime` module (`BUDGET_REGIME` + `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env vars; 4-variant enum; pure parser + scaler + env-coupled resolver); `budget_regime` + `budget_max_transactions` added as non-Optional v2 fields on `RunAggregate` and the legacy `PputResult`; loop bound at `run_swarm` switched from hardcoded `let max_transactions = 200` to `resolve_budget(n_agents)` — default (env unset) preserves Phase B baseline (`total_proposal × 200`) bit-for-bit. PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer § 3 condition 3 satisfied: `MaxTxExhausted` rows now disambiguated across N values. FC-trace: FC2-N22 (HALT decomposition by budget regime) + FC1-N7 (δ instances determining the per-agent share under PerAgent regime). Trust Root manifest 26 → 27 (corrected A8e5 J4 — the A1 PREREG amendment had taken the count to 25, A3's `agent_models.rs` to 26 before A5 landed; round-1 packet undercounted by 1).

(A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:15311:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:10:- A5 (post-A4): per-agent budget normalization — new `budget_regime` module (`BUDGET_REGIME` + `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env vars; 4-variant enum; pure parser + scaler + env-coupled resolver); `budget_regime` + `budget_max_transactions` added as non-Optional v2 fields on `RunAggregate` and the legacy `PputResult`; loop bound at `run_swarm` switched from hardcoded `let max_transactions = 200` to `resolve_budget(n_agents)` — default (env unset) preserves Phase B baseline (`total_proposal × 200`) bit-for-bit. PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer § 3 condition 3 satisfied: `MaxTxExhausted` rows now disambiguated across N values. FC-trace: FC2-N22 (HALT decomposition by budget regime) + FC1-N7 (δ instances determining the per-agent share under PerAgent regime). Trust Root manifest 26 → 27 (corrected A8e5 J4 — the A1 PREREG amendment had taken the count to 25, A3's `agent_models.rs` to 26 before A5 landed; round-1 packet undercounted by 1).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:7661:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:15:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R12.md:5561:- A4 (post-A3): decomposed metrics — `hit_max_tx`, `tactic_diversity`, `verifier_wait_ms` added as non-Optional v2 fields + `compute_tactic_diversity` helper; per-row decomposition of `solve_rate` / `tokens_per_solve` / `time_per_solve` (all derivable from existing `progress` / `total_run_token_count` / `total_wall_time_ms`). FC-trace: FC2-N22 (HALT decomposition for `hit_max_tx`) + FC1-N11 (∏p decision diversity for `tactic_diversity`) + FC1-N12 (oracle scope for `verifier_wait_ms`).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R12.md:5562:- A5 (post-A4): per-agent budget normalization — new `budget_regime` module (`BUDGET_REGIME` + `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env vars; 4-variant enum; pure parser + scaler + env-coupled resolver); `budget_regime` + `budget_max_transactions` added as non-Optional v2 fields on `RunAggregate` and the legacy `PputResult`; loop bound at `run_swarm` switched from hardcoded `let max_transactions = 200` to `resolve_budget(n_agents)` — default (env unset) preserves Phase B baseline (`total_proposal × 200`) bit-for-bit. PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer § 3 condition 3 satisfied: `MaxTxExhausted` rows now disambiguated across N values. FC-trace: FC2-N22 (HALT decomposition by budget regime) + FC1-N7 (δ instances determining the per-agent share under PerAgent regime). Trust Root manifest 26 → 27 (corrected A8e5 J4 — the A1 PREREG amendment had taken the count to 25, A3's `agent_models.rs` to 26 before A5 landed; round-1 packet undercounted by 1).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R12.md:5573:- A8e4 (post-A8e3, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-4 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini PASS — split verdict, conservative merge wins per memory `feedback_dual_audit_conflict`): three narrow documentary defects Codex found in the packet itself. **I1** packet title + date: "round 2" → "running through rounds 1–N" (cumulative, with reader pointer to most-recent round section). **I2** per-atom Trust Root deltas in § 3: A5 25→26 → 26→27, A6 26→27 → 27→28, A7 27→30 → 28→31 (all corrected to match the chain in `genesis_payload.toml` header — round-1 packet undercounted because A3's `agent_models.rs` had already raised the count to 26 before A5 landed); TRACE_MATRIX § 1 line 11 anchor-site location: "Six anchor sites wired in `run_swarm`" → "Six anchor sites wired (5 in `run_swarm` + 1 in `run_oneshot`)" — same in § 5 item 7 closure note. **I3** `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` file header docstring: "if not, it skips with a clear diagnostic" → "if not, it FAILS CLOSED with a clear diagnostic" (A8e3 H6 fixed the runtime but left the docstring stale; Codex R4#3 caught the contradiction). Trust Root manifest unchanged at 34 (only re-hash of the wrapper). No source-code defects, no architectural changes; this round is purely documentary alignment.
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R12.md:5576:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:5143:- A8e4 (post-A8e3, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-4 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini PASS — split verdict, conservative merge wins per memory `feedback_dual_audit_conflict`): three narrow documentary defects Codex found in the packet itself. **I1** packet title + date: "round 2" → "running through rounds 1–N" (cumulative, with reader pointer to most-recent round section). **I2** per-atom Trust Root deltas in § 3: A5 25→26 → 26→27, A6 26→27 → 27→28, A7 27→30 → 28→31 (all corrected to match the chain in `genesis_payload.toml` header — round-1 packet undercounted because A3's `agent_models.rs` had already raised the count to 26 before A5 landed); TRACE_MATRIX § 1 line 11 anchor-site location: "Six anchor sites wired in `run_swarm`" → "Six anchor sites wired (5 in `run_swarm` + 1 in `run_oneshot`)" — same in § 5 item 7 closure note. **I3** `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` file header docstring: "if not, it skips with a clear diagnostic" → "if not, it FAILS CLOSED with a clear diagnostic" (A8e3 H6 fixed the runtime but left the docstring stale; Codex R4#3 caught the contradiction). Trust Root manifest unchanged at 34 (only re-hash of the wrapper). No source-code defects, no architectural changes; this round is purely documentary alignment.
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:5146:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:5176:## § 2. New code symbols (Phase A0–A3)
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:5188:| `agent_models::{AGENT_MODELS_ENV_VAR, PHASE_D_HETERO_GATE_ENV_VAR, AgentModelsError, parse_agent_models, expand_agent_models, resolve_agent_models}` (A3) | `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/agent_models.rs` | FC1-N7 δ/AI per-agent assignment; gates Phase B+C single-model invariant (notepad F-2026-04-25-02) | ✅ |

A1 (PREREG amendment) → 25; A3 (agent_models.rs) → 26; A5 (budget_regime.rs) → 27; A6 (fc_trace.rs) → 28; A7 (llm_proxy.py + smoke_siliconflow.sh + _smoke_siliconflow.py) → 31; A8e (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py) → 33; A8e2 (llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs) → 34. Closes Codex#5.
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:6085:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:8062:    56	- (RQ8) Verify G3: re-count `genesis_payload.toml` `[trust_root]` entries (expect 34) and check TRACE_MATRIX_v2 manifest milestones list matches A0=24 → A1=25 → A3=26 → A5=27 → A6=28 → A7=31 → A8e=33 → A8e2=34.
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:6114:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:8129:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:16:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

A1 (PREREG amendment) → 25; A3 (agent_models.rs) → 26; A5 (budget_regime.rs) → 27; A6 (fc_trace.rs) → 28; A7 (llm_proxy.py + smoke_siliconflow.sh + _smoke_siliconflow.py) → 31; A8e (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py) → 33; A8e2 (llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs) → 34. When B7-extra calibration eventually runs, the calibration jsonl makes 35 entries; future Phase C's `--mode` flag binary (TBD location) makes 36.

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:10316:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:17:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:10339:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:17:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
