handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:11107:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:6014:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:6855:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:16:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:11287:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:9979:    17	- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:11884:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:7371:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:7745:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:7898:    16	- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

(A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:12100:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:12870:handover/audits/A8_EXIT_PACKET_2026-04-26.md:62:- **Statistical framing**: `0.10` is the **least-strict admissible value** the PREREG ceiling allows. `j-RR ≤ p_0` makes a SMALLER `p_0` stricter, so this substitution is operationally permitted but is NOT a tighter-than-original guarantee. No Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive (PREREG § 5.4), outside the inferential family. The substitution is operationally permitted at any phase including Phase E; if/when § 3 re-calibration conditions complete, calibration upgrades the bar.
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:12101:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:12871:handover/audits/A8_EXIT_PACKET_2026-04-26.md:143:- (Q2.a) `p_0 = 0.10` substitution wording: is `PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer_2026-04-25.md` § 2 + § 8 internally consistent + statistically correct (least-strict admissible; no Type-I inflation; substitution operative at any phase including Phase E)?

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R8.md:5410:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R8.md:5460:| `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` Rust→Python wrapper (A8e2 fix G1) | `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` | A8 round-2 audit (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1): the round-robin conformance battery in `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` was only manual; tests that don't run automatically are documentation, not gates. G1 wires the Python suite into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust integration test that shells to `python3` and asserts exit 0 + the unittest "OK" trailer. The V3L-27 mitigation (case C-027) is now a recurring conformance gate exercised on every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. | ✅ |

Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R8.md:5723:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:20:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R8.md:5727:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:69:| `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` Rust→Python wrapper (A8e2 fix G1) | `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` | A8 round-2 audit (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1): the round-robin conformance battery in `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` was only manual; tests that don't run automatically are documentation, not gates. G1 wires the Python suite into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust integration test that shells to `python3` and asserts exit 0 + the unittest "OK" trailer. The V3L-27 mitigation (case C-027) is now a recurring conformance gate exercised on every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. | ✅ |
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R8.md:5808:handover/audits/A8_EXIT_PACKET_2026-04-26.md:46:| `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` | **16/16 PASS** | proxy routing + round-robin conformance (also wrapped by `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` so it runs every `cargo test --workspace`) |

Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R7.md:6381:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:19:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R7.md:10000:113:- `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py`: 16-test routing + round-robin conformance suite (no live API). Wrapped by `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` (added by A8e2 G1) so the suite runs on every `cargo test --workspace`. The wrapper FAILS CLOSED if `python3` is missing (A8e3 H6); explicit opt-out `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1`.

handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_1_4_PRE1_ROUND5_AUDIT_2026-04-28.md:10645:src/state/typed_tx.rs:1287:        let dv_clean = v_clean.to_signing_payload().canonical_digest();
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:88:- **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1, hardened by A8e3 H6): `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` — Rust integration test that shells to `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` + asserts exit 0 + checks for the unittest "OK" trailer. Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:5108:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:5109:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:5158:| `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` Rust→Python wrapper (A8e2 fix G1) | `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` | A8 round-2 audit (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1): the round-robin conformance battery in `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` was only manual; tests that don't run automatically are documentation, not gates. G1 wires the Python suite into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust integration test that shells to `python3` and asserts exit 0 + the unittest "OK" trailer. The V3L-27 mitigation (case C-027) is now a recurring conformance gate exercised on every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. | ✅ |

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:7660:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:14:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:7661:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:15:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/G2_TB_18R_DUAL_AUDIT_VERDICT_2026-05-06.md:27:**Method asymmetry**: Codex inspected actual source files at file:line, ran `cargo test --workspace`, and read the per-run `chain_invariant.json` + `verdict.json` evidence end-to-end. Gemini reviewed the inlined dispatch + charter + concatenated source slices but did not execute tests. Codex's findings are runtime-validated; Gemini's are static.

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:88:- **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1, hardened by A8e3 H6): `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` — Rust integration test that shells to `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` + asserts exit 0 + checks for the unittest "OK" trailer. Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:5146:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:5195:| `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` Rust→Python wrapper (A8e2 fix G1) | `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` | A8 round-2 audit (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1): the round-robin conformance battery in `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` was only manual; tests that don't run automatically are documentation, not gates. G1 wires the Python suite into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust integration test that shells to `python3` and asserts exit 0 + the unittest "OK" trailer. The V3L-27 mitigation (case C-027) is now a recurring conformance gate exercised on every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. | ✅ |

(A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:6013:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:6854:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:15:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).

FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:6879:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:5408:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:14:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:6880:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:5409:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:15:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:7159:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:7682:`cargo test --workspace` passes: 265 passed / 29 ignored / 0 failed. `cargo test -p minif2f_v4 --test llm_proxy_python_conformance` passes. With `PATH=/tmp`, the compiled wrapper fails closed with exit 101 when `python3` is missing. `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` passes 15/15. Trust Root immutability tests pass and `[trust_root]` recount is 34 entries. `scripts/smoke_siliconflow.sh` passes for all 3 keys. A1-A7 commit checks found FC-trace lines and no `constitution.md` touches.

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:9709:    48	- **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1, hardened by A8e3 H6): `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` — Rust integration test that shells to `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` + asserts exit 0 + checks for the unittest "OK" trailer. Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:10028:    66	| `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` Rust→Python wrapper (A8e2 fix G1) | `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` | A8 round-2 audit (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1): the round-robin conformance battery in `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` was only manual; tests that don't run automatically are documentation, not gates. G1 wires the Python suite into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust integration test that shells to `python3` and asserts exit 0 + the unittest "OK" trailer. The V3L-27 mitigation (case C-027) is now a recurring conformance gate exercised on every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. | ✅ |

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:6827:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:669:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R4.md:2973:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R3.md:2385:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:39:# 2026-05-03 TB-12 SHIPPED — "P3 carry-forward + P4 primary: Node Exposure Index per architect 2026-05-03 ruling §3 + §10". Class 3 envelope (Atom 1 = Class 2 schema; Atom 2 = Class 3 dispatch wire; Atom 6 = Class 3 dual audit Codex + Gemini both ✓). Self-audit PASS; Codex CHALLENGE × 2 (Q4 doc-drift on 4-vs-5-holding total_supply; Q5 legacy CPMM in src/prediction_market.rs predates TB-12) — both resolved as documentation/scope clarifications via recursive audit §10 + OBS_TB_12_LEGACY_CPMM_QUARANTINE_2026-05-03.md (TB-13 prerequisite); Gemini round-1 PASS / high conviction / PROCEED to SHIP (gemini-2.5-pro, 896k char prompt, 48.2s API; 8/8 audit questions PASS). User-architect ultrathink verified architect §9 strict alignment before SHIP — found 4 SG-12.x test-name drifts (SG-12.5 / 12.6 / 12.7 / 12.8 names didn't exactly match architect's "passes" strings); all 4 fixed BEFORE SHIP per feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite (NOT post-ship patch): SG-12.5 renamed to sg_12_5_replay_reconstructs_node_positions; SG-12.6 ADDED sg_12_6_dashboard_view_positions_works inside src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs #[cfg(test)] mod tb12_render_tests with 4 cases + forbidden-token grep; SG-12.7 renamed to sg_12_7_no_market_trading_variants_introduced; SG-12.8 ADDED sg_12_8_no_node_market_entry_as_canonical_state at integration-test level (q_state.rs unit alias kept as defense-in-depth). 8/8 SG-12.x by architect §9.3 EXACT names PASS. cargo test --workspace = 759/0/150 (+12 net vs TB-11 ship 747; +28 vs TB-10 ship 731). Architectural deltas: NEW src/state/typed_tx.rs (NodePosition struct + PositionSide enum + PositionKind enum); EXTEND src/state/q_state.rs (NodePositionsIndex flat shape + EconomicState 10→11 sub-fields with +node_positions_t serde-default); EXTEND src/state/sequencer.rs (WorkTx + ChallengeTx accept-arm pure-additive NodePosition write — no balances_t / stakes_t / challenge_cases_t / total_supply mutation; CR-12.1 + CR-12.2 verified); EXTEND src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs (NodePosition NOT in 4-holding total_supply_micro; structural — assert_total_ctf_conserved unchanged); EXTEND src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (§13 Node exposure records + render_section_13 pure-fn helper for SG-12.6 unit-testability + LABEL DISCIPLINE "exposure records" NOT "Open market balances" per architect §8 Atom 4); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (TB-11 G3/G4 carry-forward — 4 EvidenceCapsule counters + write_evidence_capsule + tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run wired at MAX_TX exhausted exit point); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/lean_market.rs (3 new subcommands: tick POLICY PREVIEW MODE — actual emission deferred to system_keypair persistence + view-bankruptcy read-only listing + view-positions read-only NodePosition browser); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for src/state/sequencer.rs + src/state/typed_tx.rs + src/state/q_state.rs + src/state/mod.rs + src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs + experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (lean_market.rs outside trust root by TB-10 precedent). Halting triggers (architect §7) NONE triggered: CTF conservation passes (Gemini Q1+Q4); position-tx field derivation exact (position_fields_derived_from_source_tx_exactly test PASS); NodePosition NOT counted as Coin (4-holding model unchanged); replay deterministic (sg_12_5 PASS); no Codex/Gemini VETO. Production claim: "TB-12 establishes a flat, immutable, non-monetary NodePositionsIndex anchoring WorkTx.stake → FirstLong + ChallengeTx.stake → ChallengeShort exposure records on canonical L4-derived QState. NodePosition is exposure record NOT active position balance per architect §10 critical insight; TB-13 CompleteSet introduces real YES/NO claims; TB-14 PriceIndex computes price from long/short interest; TB-16 controlled-arena introduces P&L. Charter Q6 (ii.5) sync mode honored — dual audit complete + user-architect ultrathink verdict before SHIP." Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): TB-13 prerequisite quarantine of src/prediction_market.rs legacy f64 CPMM (OBS-tracked); system_keypair persistence + reattachment factory for lean_market tick on-chain emission; real-LLM zeta-regularization rerun (Atom 0.5(a) wired the call site; manual user-driven session post-ship).

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:6838:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:742:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R1.md:6448:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:45:# 2026-05-03 TB-15 SHIPPED — "P4 Information Loom (primary) + P5 MetaTape v0 prep: Lamarckian Autopsy + Markov EvidenceCapsule per architect 2026-05-02 + 2026-05-03 §6 verbatim spec (FR-15.1..6 + CR-15.1..6 + SG-15.1..8 + 6 halt triggers + forbidden list)". Class 2 envelope (self-audit; AgentVisibleProjection unchanged; only one new sequencer dispatch hook — TaskBankruptcyTx Step 3.5 + apply_one Stage 3.5). 7-atom plan (charter + halt fixture + AgentAutopsyCapsule schema/writer + AutopsyIndex/TaskBankruptcyTx wire-in + cluster_autopsies + MarkovEvidenceCapsule schema/generator + dashboard §15/first capsule/SHIP) all green. Auto-resolutions per feedback_architect_deviation_stance: A) single trigger site = TaskBankruptcyTx (SlashTx wires when RSP-3.2 ships; FinalizeReward loser branch wires when RSP-4 ships); B) EconomicState 12→13 sub-fields with +agent_autopsies_t serde-default; C) privacy default = AuditOnly (re-use TB-11 CapsulePrivacyPolicy); D) clustering threshold N=3 per architect §3.2.3 verbatim; E) LossReasonClass 8 variants incl Other(String); F) Markov override = env TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE=1; G) OBS_RESOLUTIONS_INDEX_TB15 DEFERRED out of TB-15 (TB-13 audit residue, not in architect §6 spec); H) Class 2 self-audit (no AgentVisibleProjection mod). cargo test --workspace = 870/0/150 PASS (+67 net vs TB-14 ship 803). All 6 halt-triggers GREEN: #1 raw_logs_not_in_general_read_view (Atom 3 file-scan AgentVisibleProjection) + #2 markov_capsule_references_constitution_hash (Atom 5 SG-15.7) + #3 autopsy_does_not_mutate_predicates (Atom 2 file-scan no &mut PredicateRegistry/ToolRegistry/RiskPolicyRegistry/register_*/unregister_*/patch_*; CR-15.3 + SG-15.8) + #4 private_detail_not_in_other_agent_view (Atom 3 file-scan AutopsyIndex value type Vec<Cid> not raw bytes; SG-15.2) + #5 typical_error_clustering_uses_summary_only (Atom 4 cluster_autopsies serialization scan no private_detail_cid byte run; CR-15.2 + SG-15.5) + #6 deep_history_read_without_override_fails (Atom 5 try_deep_history_read_with_override_check default-deny; SG-15.4 + FR-15.5). Architectural deltas: NEW src/runtime/autopsy_capsule.rs (LossReasonClass enum + AgentAutopsyCapsule struct + format_public_summary + write_autopsy_capsule + derive_autopsies_for_bankruptcy PURE deterministic helper + write_bankruptcy_autopsies_to_cas + cluster_autopsies + TypicalErrorSummary + AutopsyWriteError + 15 unit tests); NEW src/runtime/markov_capsule.rs (ObsId newtype + MarkovEvidenceCapsule struct + with_constitution_hash + try_deep_history_read_with_override_check + override_set_from_env + write_markov_capsule + scan_unresolved_obs + sha256_of_file + MarkovGenError + 8 unit tests); NEW src/bin/generate_markov_capsule.rs (CLI binary with --tb-id/--out-dir/--constitution-path/--cas-dir/--prev-cid-hex/--alignment-dir/--no-cas args + TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE env); NEW tests/tb_15_halt_triggers.rs (6 fixtures); MOD src/state/typed_tx.rs (+RiskRuleId opaque newtype); MOD src/bottom_white/cas/schema.rs (+4 ObjectType variants AgentAutopsyCapsule + AutopsyPrivateDetail + MarkovEvidenceCapsule + NextSessionContext); MOD src/state/q_state.rs (+AutopsyIndex(BTreeMap<EventId, Vec<Cid>>) newtype + agent_autopsies_t 13th sub-field on EconomicState serde-default; sub-field count assertion 12→13); MOD src/state/sequencer.rs (TaskBankruptcyTx dispatch arm Step 3.5 PURE deterministic Cid derivation + apply_one Stage 3.5 CAS write side-effect via deterministic helper; NO predicate registry mutation; NO AgentVisibleProjection mod; NO change to monetary invariants); MOD src/runtime/mod.rs (+pub mod autopsy_capsule + pub mod markov_capsule); MOD src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (+render_section_15 pure render with AUTOPSY IS PRIVATE banner + autopsy_event_counts + latest_markov_capsule_cid_hex fields on DashboardReport + read_latest_markov_pointer helper + 4 SG-15.6 dashboard render tests); MOD 4 test fixtures sub-field count 12→13 (economic_state_reconstruct/q_state_reconstruct/six_axioms_alignment); MOD tests/fc_alignment_conformance.rs (+4 TB-15 witnesses FC1-N32 write_autopsy_capsule + FC1-N33 derive_autopsies_for_bankruptcy + FC2-N30 cluster_autopsies + FC3-N43 MarkovEvidenceCapsule); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for 6 modified files (src/runtime/mod.rs ×2 hops Atom2→Atom5; src/state/q_state.rs Atom3; src/state/typed_tx.rs Atom2; src/state/sequencer.rs Atom3; src/bottom_white/cas/schema.rs Atom2; tests/fc_alignment_conformance.rs Atom6). First Markov capsule emitted (capsule_id b244f16a1f3bd532d041a40fe39b2b7e7cc12fb58e18b61aedd76a8010eeb1b6) with constitution_hash eec695459c71fbef3685583485deb431fe3b561657b2f285b7c5e7e220e59e03; evidence at handover/evidence/tb_15_markov_capsule_2026-05-03/. Production claim: "TB-15 establishes Lamarckian Autopsy + Markov EvidenceCapsule substrate. AgentAutopsyCapsule (per-agent, per-event, AuditOnly) records loss/bankruptcy events derived deterministically from ChainTape evidence — NEVER LLM self-narration. agent_autopsies_t lives sequencer-side (NOT projected to AgentVisibleProjection per CR-15.1 + halt-trigger #1). TypicalErrorBroadcast clustering at N≥3 emits public_summary text + Cids only — NEVER private_detail_cid bytes. MarkovEvidenceCapsule binds constitution_hash + L4 + L4.E + CAS roots + previous capsule + typical_errors + unresolved_obs as next-session bootstrap default; deeper history requires TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE=1. CR-15.3/15.4 STRUCTURALLY ENFORCED via writer signature + halt-trigger #3 file-scan. Constitutional alignment: Art.II.1 + Art.III.1 + Art.III.2 + Art.III.3 + Art.III.4 + Art.V.1 + Art.0.2." Open follow-ups (carry-forward NOT ship blockers): multi-site autopsy wire-in (SlashLoss/ChallengeUnsuccessful/VerifierBondLost — when RSP-3.2/RSP-4 ship); L4/L4.E/CAS root chain-readers in Markov generator (currently zero placeholders); CAS-walking dashboard §15 (currently empty autopsy_event_counts); InitAI agent-side honoring of Markov default (P5 v1); OBS_RESOLUTIONS_INDEX_TB15 explicitly deferred per charter §7-G.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:6840:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:759:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R3.md:2385:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:39:# 2026-05-03 TB-12 SHIPPED — "P3 carry-forward + P4 primary: Node Exposure Index per architect 2026-05-03 ruling §3 + §10". Class 3 envelope (Atom 1 = Class 2 schema; Atom 2 = Class 3 dispatch wire; Atom 6 = Class 3 dual audit Codex + Gemini both ✓). Self-audit PASS; Codex CHALLENGE × 2 (Q4 doc-drift on 4-vs-5-holding total_supply; Q5 legacy CPMM in src/prediction_market.rs predates TB-12) — both resolved as documentation/scope clarifications via recursive audit §10 + OBS_TB_12_LEGACY_CPMM_QUARANTINE_2026-05-03.md (TB-13 prerequisite); Gemini round-1 PASS / high conviction / PROCEED to SHIP (gemini-2.5-pro, 896k char prompt, 48.2s API; 8/8 audit questions PASS). User-architect ultrathink verified architect §9 strict alignment before SHIP — found 4 SG-12.x test-name drifts (SG-12.5 / 12.6 / 12.7 / 12.8 names didn't exactly match architect's "passes" strings); all 4 fixed BEFORE SHIP per feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite (NOT post-ship patch): SG-12.5 renamed to sg_12_5_replay_reconstructs_node_positions; SG-12.6 ADDED sg_12_6_dashboard_view_positions_works inside src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs #[cfg(test)] mod tb12_render_tests with 4 cases + forbidden-token grep; SG-12.7 renamed to sg_12_7_no_market_trading_variants_introduced; SG-12.8 ADDED sg_12_8_no_node_market_entry_as_canonical_state at integration-test level (q_state.rs unit alias kept as defense-in-depth). 8/8 SG-12.x by architect §9.3 EXACT names PASS. cargo test --workspace = 759/0/150 (+12 net vs TB-11 ship 747; +28 vs TB-10 ship 731). Architectural deltas: NEW src/state/typed_tx.rs (NodePosition struct + PositionSide enum + PositionKind enum); EXTEND src/state/q_state.rs (NodePositionsIndex flat shape + EconomicState 10→11 sub-fields with +node_positions_t serde-default); EXTEND src/state/sequencer.rs (WorkTx + ChallengeTx accept-arm pure-additive NodePosition write — no balances_t / stakes_t / challenge_cases_t / total_supply mutation; CR-12.1 + CR-12.2 verified); EXTEND src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs (NodePosition NOT in 4-holding total_supply_micro; structural — assert_total_ctf_conserved unchanged); EXTEND src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (§13 Node exposure records + render_section_13 pure-fn helper for SG-12.6 unit-testability + LABEL DISCIPLINE "exposure records" NOT "Open market balances" per architect §8 Atom 4); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (TB-11 G3/G4 carry-forward — 4 EvidenceCapsule counters + write_evidence_capsule + tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run wired at MAX_TX exhausted exit point); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/lean_market.rs (3 new subcommands: tick POLICY PREVIEW MODE — actual emission deferred to system_keypair persistence + view-bankruptcy read-only listing + view-positions read-only NodePosition browser); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for src/state/sequencer.rs + src/state/typed_tx.rs + src/state/q_state.rs + src/state/mod.rs + src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs + experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (lean_market.rs outside trust root by TB-10 precedent). Halting triggers (architect §7) NONE triggered: CTF conservation passes (Gemini Q1+Q4); position-tx field derivation exact (position_fields_derived_from_source_tx_exactly test PASS); NodePosition NOT counted as Coin (4-holding model unchanged); replay deterministic (sg_12_5 PASS); no Codex/Gemini VETO. Production claim: "TB-12 establishes a flat, immutable, non-monetary NodePositionsIndex anchoring WorkTx.stake → FirstLong + ChallengeTx.stake → ChallengeShort exposure records on canonical L4-derived QState. NodePosition is exposure record NOT active position balance per architect §10 critical insight; TB-13 CompleteSet introduces real YES/NO claims; TB-14 PriceIndex computes price from long/short interest; TB-16 controlled-arena introduces P&L. Charter Q6 (ii.5) sync mode honored — dual audit complete + user-architect ultrathink verdict before SHIP." Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): TB-13 prerequisite quarantine of src/prediction_market.rs legacy f64 CPMM (OBS-tracked); system_keypair persistence + reattachment factory for lean_market tick on-chain emission; real-LLM zeta-regularization rerun (Atom 0.5(a) wired the call site; manual user-driven session post-ship).
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:6841:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:760:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R3.md:10785:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:36:# 2026-05-02 TB-11 SHIPPED — "P3 carry-forward + P4 primary + P6 carry-forward: Epistemic Exhaust & Capital Liberation per architect ruling 2026-05-02 §6.2". Class 3 risk class (capital-mover via TaskExpire refund + 3 system-emitted variants); recursive self-audit PASS — 4/4 clauses GREEN (Constitutional preservation / Replay-deterministic / Conservation / Negative-truth-completeness); 9/11 ship gates GREEN + 2/11 ⚠ deferred (G3 lean_market 6 subcommands wire-up + G4 evaluator forced-exhaust real-LLM smoke); 7/7 architect SG-11.1..7 ship gates structurally satisfied (capsule-on-hard-fail / RunExhausted in L4 / TaskExpire refunds / CTF preserved / dashboard regenerates / raw evidence shielded / future-Short anchor). Kernel-level architectural core SHIPPED (Atoms 1-5 of 8): TypedTx schemas + sequencer dispatch + emit_system_tx commands + EvidenceCapsule CAS writer + audit_dashboard §12. Atom 6 = smoke-evidence README composing pre-existing TB-13 PREVIEW zeta corpus (132 attempts/0 OMEGA/500_000 stuck) + 5 deterministic TB-11 integration tests as the proof. Atom 7 = recursive self-audit doc with explicit external Codex+Gemini deferral rationale (§8: TaskExpire is the sole net-new economic mutator and structurally mirrors TB-8 dual-audited FinalizeReward; capsule writer is purely additive; architect ruling itself was the architectural review). Atom 8 = this LATEST.md update + TB_LOG row + ship commit. Architectural deltas: (a) src/state/typed_tx.rs +TaskBankruptcyTx struct +TaskBankruptcySigningPayload +DOMAIN_SYSTEM_TASK_BANKRUPTCY domain prefix +RunExhaustedTx type alias for TerminalSummaryTx in failure path +TerminalSummaryTx additive bump (+parent_state_root +solver_agent +evidence_capsule_cid; no production rows pre-TB-11; safe per feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite) +TaskExpireTx additive bump (+sponsor_agent +escrow_tx_id +reason); +ExpireReason +BankruptcyReason +ExhaustionReason +CapsulePrivacyPolicy enums; golden digest constants rotated. (b) src/state/q_state.rs EconomicState 9→10 sub-fields with +runs_t: RunsIndex; +RunSummaryEntry struct; +TaskMarketState enum {Open, Expired, Bankrupt, Finalized}; TaskMarketEntry additive (+state +bankruptcy_at_logical_t +opened_at_logical_t). (c) src/state/sequencer.rs +3 dispatch arms (TaskExpire refund / TerminalSummary RunsIndex anchor / TaskBankruptcy state-flip); +3 SystemEmitCommand variants; +3 state-root domain helpers (TASK_EXPIRE_DOMAIN_V1 / TERMINAL_SUMMARY_DOMAIN_V1 / TASK_BANKRUPTCY_DOMAIN_V1); submit_agent_tx ingress fail-closed extended; verify_emitted_system_tx_signature extended. (d) src/runtime/evidence_capsule.rs NEW module — EvidenceCapsule schema (16 fields incl. 5 architect-mandated counts) + ExhaustionCounts helper + format_public_summary + write_evidence_capsule writer (3 CAS objects per capsule: raw log + manifest + capsule); CapsulePrivacyPolicy::AuditOnly default. (e) src/bottom_white/cas/schema.rs +3 ObjectType variants (EvidenceCapsule / EvidenceManifest / CompressedRunLog). (f) src/bottom_white/ledger/{system_keypair,transition_ledger}.rs +CanonicalMessage::TaskBankruptcySigning +sign_task_bankruptcy helper +TxKind::TaskBankruptcy=10. (g) src/runtime/adapter.rs +tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run +tb11_emit_expire_for_eligible runtime helpers (mirror tb8 pattern; thin wrappers over emit_system_tx with policy-gated eligibility scan). (h) src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs +§12 with 3 sub-tables (Exhausted runs / Expired tasks / Bankrupt tasks) + total-refund aggregation + privacy-mandate footer. cargo test --workspace = 747/0/150 (+16 net vs TB-10 baseline 731). Trust Root rehashed: 11 entries (typed_tx / q_state / sequencer / state/mod / cas/schema / system_keypair / transition_ledger / runtime/mod / run_summary / monetary_invariant / adapter / audit_dashboard) + 1 NEW entry (runtime/evidence_capsule.rs). Forward-binding: TB-12 NodeMarket Position Index now has the on-chain anchor it needs (TaskBankruptcyTx for future Short / NO settlement). Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): evaluator binary integration (call write_evidence_capsule + tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run on MAX_TX exhausted); lean_market binary tick + view-bankruptcy subcommands; real-LLM zeta-regularization smoke producing single tar.gz; (optional) Codex + Gemini external audits available on request via existing audit script harness.

Architectural deltas: (a) src/state/typed_tx.rs +TaskBankruptcyTx struct +TaskBankruptcySigningPayload +DOMAIN_SYSTEM_TASK_BANKRUPTCY domain prefix +RunExhaustedTx type alias for TerminalSummaryTx in failure path +TerminalSummaryTx additive bump (+parent_state_root +solver_agent +evidence_capsule_cid; no production rows pre-TB-11; safe per feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite) +TaskExpireTx additive bump (+sponsor_agent +escrow_tx_id +reason); +ExpireReason +BankruptcyReason +ExhaustionReason +CapsulePrivacyPolicy enums; golden digest constants rotated. (b) src/state/q_state.rs EconomicState 9→10 sub-fields with +runs_t: RunsIndex; +RunSummaryEntry struct; +TaskMarketState enum {Open, Expired, Bankrupt, Finalized}; TaskMarketEntry additive (+state +bankruptcy_at_logical_t +opened_at_logical_t). (c) src/state/sequencer.rs +3 dispatch arms (TaskExpire refund / TerminalSummary RunsIndex anchor / TaskBankruptcy state-flip); +3 SystemEmitCommand variants; +3 state-root domain helpers (TASK_EXPIRE_DOMAIN_V1 / TERMINAL_SUMMARY_DOMAIN_V1 / TASK_BANKRUPTCY_DOMAIN_V1); submit_agent_tx ingress fail-closed extended; verify_emitted_system_tx_signature extended. (d) src/runtime/evidence_capsule.rs NEW module — EvidenceCapsule schema (16 fields incl. 5 architect-mandated counts) + ExhaustionCounts helper + format_public_summary + write_evidence_capsule writer (3 CAS objects per capsule: raw log + manifest + capsule); CapsulePrivacyPolicy::AuditOnly default. (e) src/bottom_white/cas/schema.rs +3 ObjectType variants (EvidenceCapsule / EvidenceManifest / CompressedRunLog). (f) src/bottom_white/ledger/{system_keypair,transition_ledger}.rs +CanonicalMessage::TaskBankruptcySigning +sign_task_bankruptcy helper +TxKind::TaskBankruptcy=10. (g) src/runtime/adapter.rs +tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run +tb11_emit_expire_for_eligible runtime helpers (mirror tb8 pattern; thin wrappers over emit_system_tx with policy-gated eligibility scan). (h) src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs +§12 with 3 sub-tables (Exhausted runs / Expired tasks / Bankrupt tasks) + total-refund aggregation + privacy-mandate footer. cargo test --workspace = 747/0/150 (+16 net vs TB-10 baseline 731). Trust Root rehashed: 11 entries (typed_tx / q_state / sequencer / state/mod / cas/schema / system_keypair / transition_ledger / runtime/mod / run_summary / monetary_invariant / adapter / audit_dashboard) + 1 NEW entry (runtime/evidence_capsule.rs). Forward-binding: TB-12 NodeMarket Position Index now has the on-chain anchor it needs (TaskBankruptcyTx for future Short / NO settlement). Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): evaluator binary integration (call write_evidence_capsule + tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run on MAX_TX exhausted); lean_market binary tick + view-bankruptcy subcommands; real-LLM zeta-regularization smoke producing single tar.gz; (optional) Codex + Gemini external audits available on request via existing audit script harness.

Halting triggers (architect §7) NONE triggered: CTF conservation passes (Gemini Q1+Q4); position-tx field derivation exact (position_fields_derived_from_source_tx_exactly test PASS); NodePosition NOT counted as Coin (4-holding model unchanged); replay deterministic (sg_12_5 PASS); no Codex/Gemini VETO. Production claim: "TB-12 establishes a flat, immutable, non-monetary NodePositionsIndex anchoring WorkTx.stake → FirstLong + ChallengeTx.stake → ChallengeShort exposure records on canonical L4-derived QState. NodePosition is exposure record NOT active position balance per architect §10 critical insight; TB-13 CompleteSet introduces real YES/NO claims; TB-14 PriceIndex computes price from long/short interest; TB-16 controlled-arena introduces P&L. Charter Q6 (ii.5) sync mode honored — dual audit complete + user-architect ultrathink verdict before SHIP." Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): TB-13 prerequisite quarantine of src/prediction_market.rs legacy f64 CPMM (OBS-tracked); system_keypair persistence + reattachment factory for lean_market tick on-chain emission; real-LLM zeta-regularization rerun (Atom 0.5(a) wired the call site; manual user-driven session post-ship).

Production claim: "TB-15 establishes Lamarckian Autopsy + Markov EvidenceCapsule substrate. AgentAutopsyCapsule (per-agent, per-event, AuditOnly) records loss/bankruptcy events derived deterministically from ChainTape evidence — NEVER LLM self-narration. agent_autopsies_t lives sequencer-side (NOT projected to AgentVisibleProjection per CR-15.1 + halt-trigger #1). TypicalErrorBroadcast clustering at N≥3 emits public_summary text + Cids only — NEVER private_detail_cid bytes. MarkovEvidenceCapsule binds constitution_hash + L4 + L4.E + CAS roots + previous capsule + typical_errors + unresolved_obs as next-session bootstrap default; deeper history requires TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE=1. CR-15.3/15.4 STRUCTURALLY ENFORCED via writer signature + halt-trigger #3 file-scan. Constitutional alignment: Art.II.1 + Art.III.1 + Art.III.2 + Art.III.3 + Art.III.4 + Art.V.1 + Art.0.2." +12 net vs TB-11 baseline 747] +5 src/state/typed_tx::tests TB-12 unit tests (PositionSide/PositionKind/NodePosition Default + round-trip) +3 src/state/q_state::tests (eleven_sub_fields + does_not_have_node_market_t + node_positions_index_default_empty) +9 tests/tb_12_node_exposure_index.rs integration tests (SG-12.1..8 architect-EXACT names + 1 halting-trigger guard position_fields_derived_from_source_tx_exactly + ctf_invariant_unchanged_across_position_derivation; SG-12.7 + SG-12.8 alias kept) +1 src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs binary unit test (sg_12_6_dashboard_view_positions_works covering 4 render cases + forbidden-token grep)	architect §9.3 SG-12.1..8 100% (8/8 by EXACT names) — sg_12_1_accepted_worktx_creates_firstlong_position / sg_12_2_accepted_challengetx_creates_challengeshort_position / sg_12_3_verifytx_does_not_create_node_position / sg_12_4_node_positions_do_not_change_total_supply / sg_12_5_replay_reconstructs_node_positions / sg_12_6_dashboard_view_positions_works / sg_12_7_no_market_trading_variants_introduced / sg_12_8_no_node_market_entry_as_canonical_state ALL PASS	Art.0.2 (Tape Canonical: NodePosition canonical-encoded; Q-projection deterministic from typed-tx fields with no env input) + Art.I.1 (5-step compile loop: accept-side derives exposure record additively; predicate outcome unchanged) + Art.III.4 (no fake accepted preserved — NodePosition is sequencer-derived, not agent-claimed; CR-12.3) + Art.V.1.3 (Anti-Oreo: NodePosition is sequencer-derived from typed-tx fields; no agent-callable surface; lean_market view-positions is read-only) + WP-§5.L4 (canonical state derived from L4 walk; replay deterministic per sg_12_5) + WP-§14.1 (no new typed_tx variant; pure side-effect on existing WorkTx + ChallengeTx accept arms) + WP-§19 (RSP-2 / RSP-3 substrate — work / challenge stake now leaves chain-resident exposure trail) + feedback_o1_chain_on_auditability (state facts → L4 anchor → derived index in QState) + feedback_kolmogorov_compression (architect ruling lossless archive) + feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite (additive 11th sub-field on EconomicState; ultrathink fixes done BEFORE ship not as post-ship patch) + feedback_dual_audit (Class 3 dual; Codex CHALLENGE×2 + Gemini PASS; conservative-verdict-wins applied) + feedback_iteration_cap_24h (production wire-up exception 72h; Atom 0.5 + Atom 6 deferred items tracked) + feedback_workspace_test_canonical (cargo test --workspace = 759/0/150; canonical reporting)	<pending Atom 7 ship commit>
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:7143:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R4.md:3581:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R3.md:10786:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:39:# 2026-05-03 TB-12 SHIPPED — "P3 carry-forward + P4 primary: Node Exposure Index per architect 2026-05-03 ruling §3 + §10". Class 3 envelope (Atom 1 = Class 2 schema; Atom 2 = Class 3 dispatch wire; Atom 6 = Class 3 dual audit Codex + Gemini both ✓). Self-audit PASS; Codex CHALLENGE × 2 (Q4 doc-drift on 4-vs-5-holding total_supply; Q5 legacy CPMM in src/prediction_market.rs predates TB-12) — both resolved as documentation/scope clarifications via recursive audit §10 + OBS_TB_12_LEGACY_CPMM_QUARANTINE_2026-05-03.md (TB-13 prerequisite); Gemini round-1 PASS / high conviction / PROCEED to SHIP (gemini-2.5-pro, 896k char prompt, 48.2s API; 8/8 audit questions PASS). User-architect ultrathink verified architect §9 strict alignment before SHIP — found 4 SG-12.x test-name drifts (SG-12.5 / 12.6 / 12.7 / 12.8 names didn't exactly match architect's "passes" strings); all 4 fixed BEFORE SHIP per feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite (NOT post-ship patch): SG-12.5 renamed to sg_12_5_replay_reconstructs_node_positions; SG-12.6 ADDED sg_12_6_dashboard_view_positions_works inside src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs #[cfg(test)] mod tb12_render_tests with 4 cases + forbidden-token grep; SG-12.7 renamed to sg_12_7_no_market_trading_variants_introduced; SG-12.8 ADDED sg_12_8_no_node_market_entry_as_canonical_state at integration-test level (q_state.rs unit alias kept as defense-in-depth). 8/8 SG-12.x by architect §9.3 EXACT names PASS. cargo test --workspace = 759/0/150 (+12 net vs TB-11 ship 747; +28 vs TB-10 ship 731). Architectural deltas: NEW src/state/typed_tx.rs (NodePosition struct + PositionSide enum + PositionKind enum); EXTEND src/state/q_state.rs (NodePositionsIndex flat shape + EconomicState 10→11 sub-fields with +node_positions_t serde-default); EXTEND src/state/sequencer.rs (WorkTx + ChallengeTx accept-arm pure-additive NodePosition write — no balances_t / stakes_t / challenge_cases_t / total_supply mutation; CR-12.1 + CR-12.2 verified); EXTEND src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs (NodePosition NOT in 4-holding total_supply_micro; structural — assert_total_ctf_conserved unchanged); EXTEND src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (§13 Node exposure records + render_section_13 pure-fn helper for SG-12.6 unit-testability + LABEL DISCIPLINE "exposure records" NOT "Open market balances" per architect §8 Atom 4); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (TB-11 G3/G4 carry-forward — 4 EvidenceCapsule counters + write_evidence_capsule + tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run wired at MAX_TX exhausted exit point); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/lean_market.rs (3 new subcommands: tick POLICY PREVIEW MODE — actual emission deferred to system_keypair persistence + view-bankruptcy read-only listing + view-positions read-only NodePosition browser); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for src/state/sequencer.rs + src/state/typed_tx.rs + src/state/q_state.rs + src/state/mod.rs + src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs + experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (lean_market.rs outside trust root by TB-10 precedent). Halting triggers (architect §7) NONE triggered: CTF conservation passes (Gemini Q1+Q4); position-tx field derivation exact (position_fields_derived_from_source_tx_exactly test PASS); NodePosition NOT counted as Coin (4-holding model unchanged); replay deterministic (sg_12_5 PASS); no Codex/Gemini VETO. Production claim: "TB-12 establishes a flat, immutable, non-monetary NodePositionsIndex anchoring WorkTx.stake → FirstLong + ChallengeTx.stake → ChallengeShort exposure records on canonical L4-derived QState. NodePosition is exposure record NOT active position balance per architect §10 critical insight; TB-13 CompleteSet introduces real YES/NO claims; TB-14 PriceIndex computes price from long/short interest; TB-16 controlled-arena introduces P&L. Charter Q6 (ii.5) sync mode honored — dual audit complete + user-architect ultrathink verdict before SHIP." Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): TB-13 prerequisite quarantine of src/prediction_market.rs legacy f64 CPMM (OBS-tracked); system_keypair persistence + reattachment factory for lean_market tick on-chain emission; real-LLM zeta-regularization rerun (Atom 0.5(a) wired the call site; manual user-driven session post-ship).
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:7648:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R1.md:6448:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:45:# 2026-05-03 TB-15 SHIPPED — "P4 Information Loom (primary) + P5 MetaTape v0 prep: Lamarckian Autopsy + Markov EvidenceCapsule per architect 2026-05-02 + 2026-05-03 §6 verbatim spec (FR-15.1..6 + CR-15.1..6 + SG-15.1..8 + 6 halt triggers + forbidden list)". Class 2 envelope (self-audit; AgentVisibleProjection unchanged; only one new sequencer dispatch hook — TaskBankruptcyTx Step 3.5 + apply_one Stage 3.5). 7-atom plan (charter + halt fixture + AgentAutopsyCapsule schema/writer + AutopsyIndex/TaskBankruptcyTx wire-in + cluster_autopsies + MarkovEvidenceCapsule schema/generator + dashboard §15/first capsule/SHIP) all green. Auto-resolutions per feedback_architect_deviation_stance: A) single trigger site = TaskBankruptcyTx (SlashTx wires when RSP-3.2 ships; FinalizeReward loser branch wires when RSP-4 ships); B) EconomicState 12→13 sub-fields with +agent_autopsies_t serde-default; C) privacy default = AuditOnly (re-use TB-11 CapsulePrivacyPolicy); D) clustering threshold N=3 per architect §3.2.3 verbatim; E) LossReasonClass 8 variants incl Other(String); F) Markov override = env TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE=1; G) OBS_RESOLUTIONS_INDEX_TB15 DEFERRED out of TB-15 (TB-13 audit residue, not in architect §6 spec); H) Class 2 self-audit (no AgentVisibleProjection mod). cargo test --workspace = 870/0/150 PASS (+67 net vs TB-14 ship 803). All 6 halt-triggers GREEN: #1 raw_logs_not_in_general_read_view (Atom 3 file-scan AgentVisibleProjection) + #2 markov_capsule_references_constitution_hash (Atom 5 SG-15.7) + #3 autopsy_does_not_mutate_predicates (Atom 2 file-scan no &mut PredicateRegistry/ToolRegistry/RiskPolicyRegistry/register_*/unregister_*/patch_*; CR-15.3 + SG-15.8) + #4 private_detail_not_in_other_agent_view (Atom 3 file-scan AutopsyIndex value type Vec<Cid> not raw bytes; SG-15.2) + #5 typical_error_clustering_uses_summary_only (Atom 4 cluster_autopsies serialization scan no private_detail_cid byte run; CR-15.2 + SG-15.5) + #6 deep_history_read_without_override_fails (Atom 5 try_deep_history_read_with_override_check default-deny; SG-15.4 + FR-15.5). Architectural deltas: NEW src/runtime/autopsy_capsule.rs (LossReasonClass enum + AgentAutopsyCapsule struct + format_public_summary + write_autopsy_capsule + derive_autopsies_for_bankruptcy PURE deterministic helper + write_bankruptcy_autopsies_to_cas + cluster_autopsies + TypicalErrorSummary + AutopsyWriteError + 15 unit tests); NEW src/runtime/markov_capsule.rs (ObsId newtype + MarkovEvidenceCapsule struct + with_constitution_hash + try_deep_history_read_with_override_check + override_set_from_env + write_markov_capsule + scan_unresolved_obs + sha256_of_file + MarkovGenError + 8 unit tests); NEW src/bin/generate_markov_capsule.rs (CLI binary with --tb-id/--out-dir/--constitution-path/--cas-dir/--prev-cid-hex/--alignment-dir/--no-cas args + TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE env); NEW tests/tb_15_halt_triggers.rs (6 fixtures); MOD src/state/typed_tx.rs (+RiskRuleId opaque newtype); MOD src/bottom_white/cas/schema.rs (+4 ObjectType variants AgentAutopsyCapsule + AutopsyPrivateDetail + MarkovEvidenceCapsule + NextSessionContext); MOD src/state/q_state.rs (+AutopsyIndex(BTreeMap<EventId, Vec<Cid>>) newtype + agent_autopsies_t 13th sub-field on EconomicState serde-default; sub-field count assertion 12→13); MOD src/state/sequencer.rs (TaskBankruptcyTx dispatch arm Step 3.5 PURE deterministic Cid derivation + apply_one Stage 3.5 CAS write side-effect via deterministic helper; NO predicate registry mutation; NO AgentVisibleProjection mod; NO change to monetary invariants); MOD src/runtime/mod.rs (+pub mod autopsy_capsule + pub mod markov_capsule); MOD src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (+render_section_15 pure render with AUTOPSY IS PRIVATE banner + autopsy_event_counts + latest_markov_capsule_cid_hex fields on DashboardReport + read_latest_markov_pointer helper + 4 SG-15.6 dashboard render tests); MOD 4 test fixtures sub-field count 12→13 (economic_state_reconstruct/q_state_reconstruct/six_axioms_alignment); MOD tests/fc_alignment_conformance.rs (+4 TB-15 witnesses FC1-N32 write_autopsy_capsule + FC1-N33 derive_autopsies_for_bankruptcy + FC2-N30 cluster_autopsies + FC3-N43 MarkovEvidenceCapsule); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for 6 modified files (src/runtime/mod.rs ×2 hops Atom2→Atom5; src/state/q_state.rs Atom3; src/state/typed_tx.rs Atom2; src/state/sequencer.rs Atom3; src/bottom_white/cas/schema.rs Atom2; tests/fc_alignment_conformance.rs Atom6). First Markov capsule emitted (capsule_id b244f16a1f3bd532d041a40fe39b2b7e7cc12fb58e18b61aedd76a8010eeb1b6) with constitution_hash eec695459c71fbef3685583485deb431fe3b561657b2f285b7c5e7e220e59e03; evidence at handover/evidence/tb_15_markov_capsule_2026-05-03/. Production claim: "TB-15 establishes Lamarckian Autopsy + Markov EvidenceCapsule substrate. AgentAutopsyCapsule (per-agent, per-event, AuditOnly) records loss/bankruptcy events derived deterministically from ChainTape evidence — NEVER LLM self-narration. agent_autopsies_t lives sequencer-side (NOT projected to AgentVisibleProjection per CR-15.1 + halt-trigger #1). TypicalErrorBroadcast clustering at N≥3 emits public_summary text + Cids only — NEVER private_detail_cid bytes. MarkovEvidenceCapsule binds constitution_hash + L4 + L4.E + CAS roots + previous capsule + typical_errors + unresolved_obs as next-session bootstrap default; deeper history requires TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE=1. CR-15.3/15.4 STRUCTURALLY ENFORCED via writer signature + halt-trigger #3 file-scan. Constitutional alignment: Art.II.1 + Art.III.1 + Art.III.2 + Art.III.3 + Art.III.4 + Art.V.1 + Art.0.2." Open follow-ups (carry-forward NOT ship blockers): multi-site autopsy wire-in (SlashLoss/ChallengeUnsuccessful/VerifierBondLost — when RSP-3.2/RSP-4 ship); L4/L4.E/CAS root chain-readers in Markov generator (currently zero placeholders); CAS-walking dashboard §15 (currently empty autopsy_event_counts); InitAI agent-side honoring of Markov default (P5 v1); OBS_RESOLUTIONS_INDEX_TB15 explicitly deferred per charter §7-G.

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:8878:handover/ai-direct/LATEST.md:1569:**Session summary**: Closed the **durable identity** prerequisite per architect directive 2026-05-02 Part C line 1574 ruling 13 ("NodeMarket starts after durable identity AND Lean Proof Task Market MVP"). Run-local Ed25519 keypair lifecycle (TB-7) is now persistent: secrets live in an encrypted-at-rest keystore at `~/.turingos/keystore/agent_keystore.enc` (Argon2id KDF + ChaCha20-Poly1305 AEAD); the same `Agent_0 → AgentPublicKey` binding survives evaluator restart with a fresh `runtime_repo`. Concurrently, `WalletTool` collapsed to a **read-only projection** of `EconomicState.balances_t` — the parallel f64 ledger and the bus.rs legacy v3 simulation paths (`debit_wallet/credit_wallet/InvestOnly/founder_grant/settle_portfolios/Hayek bounty`) are deleted. **Architect mandate satisfied 5/5**: agent durable key registry ✓, wallet read-only projection ✓, EconomicState canonical ✓, no f64 mutation ✓, cross-run identity ✓. Class 3 risk handled via **recursive self-audit** (4-clause structure: Constitutional / Replay-deterministic / Conservation / User-minimum-contract — all PASS) per `feedback_dual_audit` hybrid-by-risk-class (kernel surface is purely additive — NO new typed_tx variant, NO dispatch arm, NO QState field; external Codex+Gemini deferred post-ship per recursive-audit §8 reasoning). Cross-run Agent_0 pubkey identity empirically verified by `diff -q` over two evaluator runs each with a fresh runtime_repo. TB-9 ship-gate test count: `cargo test --workspace = 723 / 0 / 150` (-2 net vs TB-8 ship 725 baseline; +14 new TB-9 tests, -16 deleted obsolete v3-simulation/f64-mutator tests).
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:9791:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_14_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R1.md:700:**Operating mode**: Atoms 0–5 continuous (AI-coder-decided micro-checkpoints). CP-A after Atom 2 (`cargo test --workspace` baseline preserved; no f64 in price_index.rs). CP-B after Atom 4 (mask_set + BoltzmannMaskPolicy complete; all halt-triggers except #1/#2 green). CP-C after Atom 5 (integer Boltzmann v2 complete; all 6 halt-triggers green). Atom 6 dual audit continuous; **STOP after audit verdict**. Atom 7 SHIP per plan.
