handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:10192:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:742:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R1.md:6448:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:45:# 2026-05-03 TB-15 SHIPPED — "P4 Information Loom (primary) + P5 MetaTape v0 prep: Lamarckian Autopsy + Markov EvidenceCapsule per architect 2026-05-02 + 2026-05-03 §6 verbatim spec (FR-15.1..6 + CR-15.1..6 + SG-15.1..8 + 6 halt triggers + forbidden list)". Class 2 envelope (self-audit; AgentVisibleProjection unchanged; only one new sequencer dispatch hook — TaskBankruptcyTx Step 3.5 + apply_one Stage 3.5). 7-atom plan (charter + halt fixture + AgentAutopsyCapsule schema/writer + AutopsyIndex/TaskBankruptcyTx wire-in + cluster_autopsies + MarkovEvidenceCapsule schema/generator + dashboard §15/first capsule/SHIP) all green. Auto-resolutions per feedback_architect_deviation_stance: A) single trigger site = TaskBankruptcyTx (SlashTx wires when RSP-3.2 ships; FinalizeReward loser branch wires when RSP-4 ships); B) EconomicState 12→13 sub-fields with +agent_autopsies_t serde-default; C) privacy default = AuditOnly (re-use TB-11 CapsulePrivacyPolicy); D) clustering threshold N=3 per architect §3.2.3 verbatim; E) LossReasonClass 8 variants incl Other(String); F) Markov override = env TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE=1; G) OBS_RESOLUTIONS_INDEX_TB15 DEFERRED out of TB-15 (TB-13 audit residue, not in architect §6 spec); H) Class 2 self-audit (no AgentVisibleProjection mod). cargo test --workspace = 870/0/150 PASS (+67 net vs TB-14 ship 803). All 6 halt-triggers GREEN: #1 raw_logs_not_in_general_read_view (Atom 3 file-scan AgentVisibleProjection) + #2 markov_capsule_references_constitution_hash (Atom 5 SG-15.7) + #3 autopsy_does_not_mutate_predicates (Atom 2 file-scan no &mut PredicateRegistry/ToolRegistry/RiskPolicyRegistry/register_*/unregister_*/patch_*; CR-15.3 + SG-15.8) + #4 private_detail_not_in_other_agent_view (Atom 3 file-scan AutopsyIndex value type Vec<Cid> not raw bytes; SG-15.2) + #5 typical_error_clustering_uses_summary_only (Atom 4 cluster_autopsies serialization scan no private_detail_cid byte run; CR-15.2 + SG-15.5) + #6 deep_history_read_without_override_fails (Atom 5 try_deep_history_read_with_override_check default-deny; SG-15.4 + FR-15.5). Architectural deltas: NEW src/runtime/autopsy_capsule.rs (LossReasonClass enum + AgentAutopsyCapsule struct + format_public_summary + write_autopsy_capsule + derive_autopsies_for_bankruptcy PURE deterministic helper + write_bankruptcy_autopsies_to_cas + cluster_autopsies + TypicalErrorSummary + AutopsyWriteError + 15 unit tests); NEW src/runtime/markov_capsule.rs (ObsId newtype + MarkovEvidenceCapsule struct + with_constitution_hash + try_deep_history_read_with_override_check + override_set_from_env + write_markov_capsule + scan_unresolved_obs + sha256_of_file + MarkovGenError + 8 unit tests); NEW src/bin/generate_markov_capsule.rs (CLI binary with --tb-id/--out-dir/--constitution-path/--cas-dir/--prev-cid-hex/--alignment-dir/--no-cas args + TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE env); NEW tests/tb_15_halt_triggers.rs (6 fixtures); MOD src/state/typed_tx.rs (+RiskRuleId opaque newtype); MOD src/bottom_white/cas/schema.rs (+4 ObjectType variants AgentAutopsyCapsule + AutopsyPrivateDetail + MarkovEvidenceCapsule + NextSessionContext); MOD src/state/q_state.rs (+AutopsyIndex(BTreeMap<EventId, Vec<Cid>>) newtype + agent_autopsies_t 13th sub-field on EconomicState serde-default; sub-field count assertion 12→13); MOD src/state/sequencer.rs (TaskBankruptcyTx dispatch arm Step 3.5 PURE deterministic Cid derivation + apply_one Stage 3.5 CAS write side-effect via deterministic helper; NO predicate registry mutation; NO AgentVisibleProjection mod; NO change to monetary invariants); MOD src/runtime/mod.rs (+pub mod autopsy_capsule + pub mod markov_capsule); MOD src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (+render_section_15 pure render with AUTOPSY IS PRIVATE banner + autopsy_event_counts + latest_markov_capsule_cid_hex fields on DashboardReport + read_latest_markov_pointer helper + 4 SG-15.6 dashboard render tests); MOD 4 test fixtures sub-field count 12→13 (economic_state_reconstruct/q_state_reconstruct/six_axioms_alignment); MOD tests/fc_alignment_conformance.rs (+4 TB-15 witnesses FC1-N32 write_autopsy_capsule + FC1-N33 derive_autopsies_for_bankruptcy + FC2-N30 cluster_autopsies + FC3-N43 MarkovEvidenceCapsule); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for 6 modified files (src/runtime/mod.rs ×2 hops Atom2→Atom5; src/state/q_state.rs Atom3; src/state/typed_tx.rs Atom2; src/state/sequencer.rs Atom3; src/bottom_white/cas/schema.rs Atom2; tests/fc_alignment_conformance.rs Atom6). First Markov capsule emitted (capsule_id b244f16a1f3bd532d041a40fe39b2b7e7cc12fb58e18b61aedd76a8010eeb1b6) with constitution_hash eec695459c71fbef3685583485deb431fe3b561657b2f285b7c5e7e220e59e03; evidence at handover/evidence/tb_15_markov_capsule_2026-05-03/. Production claim: "TB-15 establishes Lamarckian Autopsy + Markov EvidenceCapsule substrate. AgentAutopsyCapsule (per-agent, per-event, AuditOnly) records loss/bankruptcy events derived deterministically from ChainTape evidence — NEVER LLM self-narration. agent_autopsies_t lives sequencer-side (NOT projected to AgentVisibleProjection per CR-15.1 + halt-trigger #1). TypicalErrorBroadcast clustering at N≥3 emits public_summary text + Cids only — NEVER private_detail_cid bytes. MarkovEvidenceCapsule binds constitution_hash + L4 + L4.E + CAS roots + previous capsule + typical_errors + unresolved_obs as next-session bootstrap default; deeper history requires TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE=1. CR-15.3/15.4 STRUCTURALLY ENFORCED via writer signature + halt-trigger #3 file-scan. Constitutional alignment: Art.II.1 + Art.III.1 + Art.III.2 + Art.III.3 + Art.III.4 + Art.V.1 + Art.0.2." Open follow-ups (carry-forward NOT ship blockers): multi-site autopsy wire-in (SlashLoss/ChallengeUnsuccessful/VerifierBondLost — when RSP-3.2/RSP-4 ship); L4/L4.E/CAS root chain-readers in Markov generator (currently zero placeholders); CAS-walking dashboard §15 (currently empty autopsy_event_counts); InitAI agent-side honoring of Markov default (P5 v1); OBS_RESOLUTIONS_INDEX_TB15 explicitly deferred per charter §7-G.

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:12221:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:88:- **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1, hardened by A8e3 H6): `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` — Rust integration test that shells to `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` + asserts exit 0 + checks for the unittest "OK" trailer. Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:12373:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:12003:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:8905:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:7149:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:7661:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:15:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:12798:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:9709:    48	- **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1, hardened by A8e3 H6): `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` — Rust integration test that shells to `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` + asserts exit 0 + checks for the unittest "OK" trailer. Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:12924:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:669:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R4.md:2973:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R3.md:2385:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:39:# 2026-05-03 TB-12 SHIPPED — "P3 carry-forward + P4 primary: Node Exposure Index per architect 2026-05-03 ruling §3 + §10". Class 3 envelope (Atom 1 = Class 2 schema; Atom 2 = Class 3 dispatch wire; Atom 6 = Class 3 dual audit Codex + Gemini both ✓). Self-audit PASS; Codex CHALLENGE × 2 (Q4 doc-drift on 4-vs-5-holding total_supply; Q5 legacy CPMM in src/prediction_market.rs predates TB-12) — both resolved as documentation/scope clarifications via recursive audit §10 + OBS_TB_12_LEGACY_CPMM_QUARANTINE_2026-05-03.md (TB-13 prerequisite); Gemini round-1 PASS / high conviction / PROCEED to SHIP (gemini-2.5-pro, 896k char prompt, 48.2s API; 8/8 audit questions PASS). User-architect ultrathink verified architect §9 strict alignment before SHIP — found 4 SG-12.x test-name drifts (SG-12.5 / 12.6 / 12.7 / 12.8 names didn't exactly match architect's "passes" strings); all 4 fixed BEFORE SHIP per feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite (NOT post-ship patch): SG-12.5 renamed to sg_12_5_replay_reconstructs_node_positions; SG-12.6 ADDED sg_12_6_dashboard_view_positions_works inside src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs #[cfg(test)] mod tb12_render_tests with 4 cases + forbidden-token grep; SG-12.7 renamed to sg_12_7_no_market_trading_variants_introduced; SG-12.8 ADDED sg_12_8_no_node_market_entry_as_canonical_state at integration-test level (q_state.rs unit alias kept as defense-in-depth). 8/8 SG-12.x by architect §9.3 EXACT names PASS. cargo test --workspace = 759/0/150 (+12 net vs TB-11 ship 747; +28 vs TB-10 ship 731). Architectural deltas: NEW src/state/typed_tx.rs (NodePosition struct + PositionSide enum + PositionKind enum); EXTEND src/state/q_state.rs (NodePositionsIndex flat shape + EconomicState 10→11 sub-fields with +node_positions_t serde-default); EXTEND src/state/sequencer.rs (WorkTx + ChallengeTx accept-arm pure-additive NodePosition write — no balances_t / stakes_t / challenge_cases_t / total_supply mutation; CR-12.1 + CR-12.2 verified); EXTEND src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs (NodePosition NOT in 4-holding total_supply_micro; structural — assert_total_ctf_conserved unchanged); EXTEND src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (§13 Node exposure records + render_section_13 pure-fn helper for SG-12.6 unit-testability + LABEL DISCIPLINE "exposure records" NOT "Open market balances" per architect §8 Atom 4); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (TB-11 G3/G4 carry-forward — 4 EvidenceCapsule counters + write_evidence_capsule + tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run wired at MAX_TX exhausted exit point); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/lean_market.rs (3 new subcommands: tick POLICY PREVIEW MODE — actual emission deferred to system_keypair persistence + view-bankruptcy read-only listing + view-positions read-only NodePosition browser); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for src/state/sequencer.rs + src/state/typed_tx.rs + src/state/q_state.rs + src/state/mod.rs + src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs + experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (lean_market.rs outside trust root by TB-10 precedent). Halting triggers (architect §7) NONE triggered: CTF conservation passes (Gemini Q1+Q4); position-tx field derivation exact (position_fields_derived_from_source_tx_exactly test PASS); NodePosition NOT counted as Coin (4-holding model unchanged); replay deterministic (sg_12_5 PASS); no Codex/Gemini VETO. Production claim: "TB-12 establishes a flat, immutable, non-monetary NodePositionsIndex anchoring WorkTx.stake → FirstLong + ChallengeTx.stake → ChallengeShort exposure records on canonical L4-derived QState. NodePosition is exposure record NOT active position balance per architect §10 critical insight; TB-13 CompleteSet introduces real YES/NO claims; TB-14 PriceIndex computes price from long/short interest; TB-16 controlled-arena introduces P&L. Charter Q6 (ii.5) sync mode honored — dual audit complete + user-architect ultrathink verdict before SHIP." Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): TB-13 prerequisite quarantine of src/prediction_market.rs legacy f64 CPMM (OBS-tracked); system_keypair persistence + reattachment factory for lean_market tick on-chain emission; real-LLM zeta-regularization rerun (Atom 0.5(a) wired the call site; manual user-driven session post-ship).

Class 3 risk class (capital-mover via TaskExpire refund + 3 system-emitted variants); recursive self-audit PASS — 4/4 clauses GREEN (Constitutional preservation / Replay-deterministic / Conservation / Negative-truth-completeness); 9/11 ship gates GREEN + 2/11 ⚠ deferred (G3 lean_market 6 subcommands wire-up + G4 evaluator forced-exhaust real-LLM smoke); 7/7 architect SG-11.1..7 ship gates structurally satisfied (capsule-on-hard-fail / RunExhausted in L4 / TaskExpire refunds / CTF preserved / dashboard regenerates / raw evidence shielded / future-Short anchor). Kernel-level architectural core SHIPPED (Atoms 1-5 of 8): TypedTx schemas + sequencer dispatch + emit_system_tx commands + EvidenceCapsule CAS writer + audit_dashboard §12. Atom 6 = smoke-evidence README composing pre-existing TB-13 PREVIEW zeta corpus (132 attempts/0 OMEGA/500_000 stuck) + 5 deterministic TB-11 integration tests as the proof. Atom 7 = recursive self-audit doc with explicit external Codex+Gemini deferral rationale (§8: TaskExpire is the sole net-new economic mutator and structurally mirrors TB-8 dual-audited FinalizeReward; capsule writer is purely additive; architect ruling itself was the architectural review). Atom 8 = this LATEST.md update + TB_LOG row + ship commit. Architectural deltas: (a) src/state/typed_tx.rs +TaskBankruptcyTx struct +TaskBankruptcySigningPayload +DOMAIN_SYSTEM_TASK_BANKRUPTCY domain prefix +RunExhaustedTx type alias for TerminalSummaryTx in failure path +TerminalSummaryTx additive bump (+parent_state_root +solver_agent +evidence_capsule_cid; no production rows pre-TB-11; safe per feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite) +TaskExpireTx additive bump (+sponsor_agent +escrow_tx_id +reason); +ExpireReason +BankruptcyReason +ExhaustionReason +CapsulePrivacyPolicy enums; golden digest constants rotated. (b) src/state/q_state.rs EconomicState 9→10 sub-fields with +runs_t: RunsIndex; +RunSummaryEntry struct; +TaskMarketState enum {Open, Expired, Bankrupt, Finalized}; TaskMarketEntry additive (+state +bankruptcy_at_logical_t +opened_at_logical_t). (c) src/state/sequencer.rs +3 dispatch arms (TaskExpire refund / TerminalSummary RunsIndex anchor / TaskBankruptcy state-flip); +3 SystemEmitCommand variants; +3 state-root domain helpers (TASK_EXPIRE_DOMAIN_V1 / TERMINAL_SUMMARY_DOMAIN_V1 / TASK_BANKRUPTCY_DOMAIN_V1); submit_agent_tx ingress fail-closed extended; verify_emitted_system_tx_signature extended. (d) src/runtime/evidence_capsule.rs NEW module — EvidenceCapsule schema (16 fields incl. 5 architect-mandated counts) + ExhaustionCounts helper + format_public_summary + write_evidence_capsule writer (3 CAS objects per capsule: raw log + manifest + capsule); CapsulePrivacyPolicy::AuditOnly default. (e) src/bottom_white/cas/schema.rs +3 ObjectType variants (EvidenceCapsule / EvidenceManifest / CompressedRunLog). (f) src/bottom_white/ledger/{system_keypair,transition_ledger}.rs +CanonicalMessage::TaskBankruptcySigning +sign_task_bankruptcy helper +TxKind::TaskBankruptcy=10. (g) src/runtime/adapter.rs +tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run +tb11_emit_expire_for_eligible runtime helpers (mirror tb8 pattern; thin wrappers over emit_system_tx with policy-gated eligibility scan). (h) src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs +§12 with 3 sub-tables (Exhausted runs / Expired tasks / Bankrupt tasks) + total-refund aggregation + privacy-mandate footer. cargo test --workspace = 747/0/150 (+16 net vs TB-10 baseline 731). Trust Root rehashed: 11 entries (typed_tx / q_state / sequencer / state/mod / cas/schema / system_keypair / transition_ledger / runtime/mod / run_summary / monetary_invariant / adapter / audit_dashboard) + 1 NEW entry (runtime/evidence_capsule.rs). Forward-binding: TB-12 NodeMarket Position Index now has the on-chain anchor it needs (TaskBankruptcyTx for future Short / NO settlement). Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): evaluator binary integration (call write_evidence_capsule + tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run on MAX_TX exhausted); lean_market binary tick + view-bankruptcy subcommands; real-LLM zeta-regularization smoke producing single tar.gz; (optional) Codex + Gemini external audits available on request via existing audit script harness.

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:12939:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:763:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:3676:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R4.md:2973:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R3.md:2385:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:39:# 2026-05-03 TB-12 SHIPPED — "P3 carry-forward + P4 primary: Node Exposure Index per architect 2026-05-03 ruling §3 + §10". Class 3 envelope (Atom 1 = Class 2 schema; Atom 2 = Class 3 dispatch wire; Atom 6 = Class 3 dual audit Codex + Gemini both ✓). Self-audit PASS; Codex CHALLENGE × 2 (Q4 doc-drift on 4-vs-5-holding total_supply; Q5 legacy CPMM in src/prediction_market.rs predates TB-12) — both resolved as documentation/scope clarifications via recursive audit §10 + OBS_TB_12_LEGACY_CPMM_QUARANTINE_2026-05-03.md (TB-13 prerequisite); Gemini round-1 PASS / high conviction / PROCEED to SHIP (gemini-2.5-pro, 896k char prompt, 48.2s API; 8/8 audit questions PASS). User-architect ultrathink verified architect §9 strict alignment before SHIP — found 4 SG-12.x test-name drifts (SG-12.5 / 12.6 / 12.7 / 12.8 names didn't exactly match architect's "passes" strings); all 4 fixed BEFORE SHIP per feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite (NOT post-ship patch): SG-12.5 renamed to sg_12_5_replay_reconstructs_node_positions; SG-12.6 ADDED sg_12_6_dashboard_view_positions_works inside src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs #[cfg(test)] mod tb12_render_tests with 4 cases + forbidden-token grep; SG-12.7 renamed to sg_12_7_no_market_trading_variants_introduced; SG-12.8 ADDED sg_12_8_no_node_market_entry_as_canonical_state at integration-test level (q_state.rs unit alias kept as defense-in-depth). 8/8 SG-12.x by architect §9.3 EXACT names PASS. cargo test --workspace = 759/0/150 (+12 net vs TB-11 ship 747; +28 vs TB-10 ship 731). Architectural deltas: NEW src/state/typed_tx.rs (NodePosition struct + PositionSide enum + PositionKind enum); EXTEND src/state/q_state.rs (NodePositionsIndex flat shape + EconomicState 10→11 sub-fields with +node_positions_t serde-default); EXTEND src/state/sequencer.rs (WorkTx + ChallengeTx accept-arm pure-additive NodePosition write — no balances_t / stakes_t / challenge_cases_t / total_supply mutation; CR-12.1 + CR-12.2 verified); EXTEND src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs (NodePosition NOT in 4-holding total_supply_micro; structural — assert_total_ctf_conserved unchanged); EXTEND src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (§13 Node exposure records + render_section_13 pure-fn helper for SG-12.6 unit-testability + LABEL DISCIPLINE "exposure records" NOT "Open market balances" per architect §8 Atom 4); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (TB-11 G3/G4 carry-forward — 4 EvidenceCapsule counters + write_evidence_capsule + tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run wired at MAX_TX exhausted exit point); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/lean_market.rs (3 new subcommands: tick POLICY PREVIEW MODE — actual emission deferred to system_keypair persistence + view-bankruptcy read-only listing + view-positions read-only NodePosition browser); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for src/state/sequencer.rs + src/state/typed_tx.rs + src/state/q_state.rs + src/state/mod.rs + src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs + experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (lean_market.rs outside trust root by TB-10 precedent). Halting triggers (architect §7) NONE triggered: CTF conservation passes (Gemini Q1+Q4); position-tx field derivation exact (position_fields_derived_from_source_tx_exactly test PASS); NodePosition NOT counted as Coin (4-holding model unchanged); replay deterministic (sg_12_5 PASS); no Codex/Gemini VETO. Production claim: "TB-12 establishes a flat, immutable, non-monetary NodePositionsIndex anchoring WorkTx.stake → FirstLong + ChallengeTx.stake → ChallengeShort exposure records on canonical L4-derived QState. NodePosition is exposure record NOT active position balance per architect §10 critical insight; TB-13 CompleteSet introduces real YES/NO claims; TB-14 PriceIndex computes price from long/short interest; TB-16 controlled-arena introduces P&L. Charter Q6 (ii.5) sync mode honored — dual audit complete + user-architect ultrathink verdict before SHIP." Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): TB-13 prerequisite quarantine of src/prediction_market.rs legacy f64 CPMM (OBS-tracked); system_keypair persistence + reattachment factory for lean_market tick on-chain emission; real-LLM zeta-regularization rerun (Atom 0.5(a) wired the call site; manual user-driven session post-ship).

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:13674:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:6601:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:88:- **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1, hardened by A8e3 H6): `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` — Rust integration test that shells to `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` + asserts exit 0 + checks for the unittest "OK" trailer. Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.

Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:13874:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:9440:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R3.md:5081:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:13875:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:9441:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R3.md:5131:| `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` Rust→Python wrapper (A8e2 fix G1) | `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` | A8 round-2 audit (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1): the round-robin conformance battery in `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` was only manual; tests that don't run automatically are documentation, not gates. G1 wires the Python suite into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust integration test that shells to `python3` and asserts exit 0 + the unittest "OK" trailer. The V3L-27 mitigation (case C-027) is now a recurring conformance gate exercised on every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. | ✅ |

Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:15344:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R3.md:2382:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:24:TB-6	shipped	2026-05-01	2026-05-01	P2 (primary; P1/P3 carry-forward)	P1:5,6,7,8,9 P2:6 P3:carry-forward (production-path re-discharge of TB-2..TB-5 invariants under on-disk ChainTape; no new exit criterion)	P1:1,2,3,4 P3:1,2,3 (kill criteria re-tested through production wire-up; P3:9 slash NOT tested — RSP-3.2 territory deferred TB-9)	[660/0/150 PASS @ 17c5e73 across 51 suites; +43 net TB-6 tests across Atoms 1-6 vs TB-5 ship 617/617 baseline] Atom 1 (production runtime bootstrap; STEP_B Phase-0 v1→v2→v2.1 preflight + Codex round-1+2 closed): src/runtime/{mod.rs, adapter.rs} factory + driver wrapper + L4.E JSONL persistence backend + 15 tests. Atom 2 (chaintape adapter): synthetic-tx constructors + initial_q variant + T10/T11/T12/T13 (T12 = ≥1 L4 + ≥1 L4.E in one bundle). Atom 3 (chain-backed smoke): handover/evidence/tb_6_chaintape_smoke_2026-05-01/ with refs/transitions/main commit 38f7112f6401067ffc66c5a00338e12ec810170b + 1 L4 entry (TaskOpen accepted) + 1 L4.E entry (zero-stake WorkTx rejected, synthetic_rejection_for_l4e_gate=true label). Atom 4 (verify_chaintape replay verifier): src/runtime/verify.rs library + src/bin/verify_chaintape.rs CLI + I90/I90b/I90c integration tests; replay_report.json on smoke evidence shows all 7 architect-mandated boolean indicators true (l4_entries, l4e_entries, ledger_root_verified, system_signatures_verified, state_reconstructed, economic_state_reconstructed, cas_payloads_retrievable). Atom 5 (agent audit trail): src/runtime/agent_audit_trail.rs with AgentProposalRecord (9 fields per architect spec) + AcceptedOrRejected enum + CAS storage + AgentAuditTrailIndex JSONL with prev_hash→hash chain + I91/I91b/I91d (I91d structural witness blocks future schema migrations from adding chain_of_thought / model_deliberation / tool_transcript / raw_prompt / raw_completion / internal_reasoning fields). Atom 6 (RunSummary): src/runtime/run_summary.rs aggregator + src/bin/gen_run_summary.rs CLI + I92/I92b/I92c; run_summary.json on smoke evidence shows 1 accepted tx_id + 1 rejected tx_id + 2 candidate proposal CIDs. Self-audit: handover/audits/RECURSIVE_AUDIT_TB_6_2026-05-01.md (7/7 architect D1-D7 + 7/7 charter § 4 decision blocks + 20/20 charter § 6 forbidden lines + 3/3 § 8 ship proofs all GREEN); audit label `degraded` (Gemini strategic-tier MODEL_CAPACITY_EXHAUSTED per TB-5 supplement precedent; Codex round-1+2 applied at Atom 1 STEP_B preflight; final Codex impl audit on full TB-6 diff recommended as TB-7 follow-up but non-blocking per charter § 9 + ruling D3 hybrid-by-risk). 5-TB ChainTape production debt CLOSED. Production claim adds: "TuringOS production binary drives the runtime kernel through Sequencer::apply_one to on-disk ChainTape (refs/transitions/main commit chain + cas/ + rejections.jsonl chain-hashed). Replay verifier reconstructs QState + EconomicState from L4 alone via replay_full_transition (CO1.7-impl A4 I-DETHASH witness). Agent audit trail records what the Agent saw + submitted + how the system judged, NOT chain-of-thought (structurally enforced by JSON-grep witness). RunSummary aggregates proposal-level fork visibility. The kernel claims TB-1..TB-5 made are now verifiable from on-disk artifacts produced by an LLM-driven run, not only from cargo test --workspace in-memory state."	?→?	Art-Laws.1+2 Art-I.1.1 Art-II.2 Art-V (Anti-Oreo at production path) WP-§5.L1-L4 (production-side) WP-§12.4 (separation in real binary) Constitution.D7-no-amendment	7970d2d..17c5e73
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_16_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R3.md:15347:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R3.md:2385:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:39:# 2026-05-03 TB-12 SHIPPED — "P3 carry-forward + P4 primary: Node Exposure Index per architect 2026-05-03 ruling §3 + §10". Class 3 envelope (Atom 1 = Class 2 schema; Atom 2 = Class 3 dispatch wire; Atom 6 = Class 3 dual audit Codex + Gemini both ✓). Self-audit PASS; Codex CHALLENGE × 2 (Q4 doc-drift on 4-vs-5-holding total_supply; Q5 legacy CPMM in src/prediction_market.rs predates TB-12) — both resolved as documentation/scope clarifications via recursive audit §10 + OBS_TB_12_LEGACY_CPMM_QUARANTINE_2026-05-03.md (TB-13 prerequisite); Gemini round-1 PASS / high conviction / PROCEED to SHIP (gemini-2.5-pro, 896k char prompt, 48.2s API; 8/8 audit questions PASS). User-architect ultrathink verified architect §9 strict alignment before SHIP — found 4 SG-12.x test-name drifts (SG-12.5 / 12.6 / 12.7 / 12.8 names didn't exactly match architect's "passes" strings); all 4 fixed BEFORE SHIP per feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite (NOT post-ship patch): SG-12.5 renamed to sg_12_5_replay_reconstructs_node_positions; SG-12.6 ADDED sg_12_6_dashboard_view_positions_works inside src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs #[cfg(test)] mod tb12_render_tests with 4 cases + forbidden-token grep; SG-12.7 renamed to sg_12_7_no_market_trading_variants_introduced; SG-12.8 ADDED sg_12_8_no_node_market_entry_as_canonical_state at integration-test level (q_state.rs unit alias kept as defense-in-depth). 8/8 SG-12.x by architect §9.3 EXACT names PASS. cargo test --workspace = 759/0/150 (+12 net vs TB-11 ship 747; +28 vs TB-10 ship 731). Architectural deltas: NEW src/state/typed_tx.rs (NodePosition struct + PositionSide enum + PositionKind enum); EXTEND src/state/q_state.rs (NodePositionsIndex flat shape + EconomicState 10→11 sub-fields with +node_positions_t serde-default); EXTEND src/state/sequencer.rs (WorkTx + ChallengeTx accept-arm pure-additive NodePosition write — no balances_t / stakes_t / challenge_cases_t / total_supply mutation; CR-12.1 + CR-12.2 verified); EXTEND src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs (NodePosition NOT in 4-holding total_supply_micro; structural — assert_total_ctf_conserved unchanged); EXTEND src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (§13 Node exposure records + render_section_13 pure-fn helper for SG-12.6 unit-testability + LABEL DISCIPLINE "exposure records" NOT "Open market balances" per architect §8 Atom 4); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (TB-11 G3/G4 carry-forward — 4 EvidenceCapsule counters + write_evidence_capsule + tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run wired at MAX_TX exhausted exit point); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/lean_market.rs (3 new subcommands: tick POLICY PREVIEW MODE — actual emission deferred to system_keypair persistence + view-bankruptcy read-only listing + view-positions read-only NodePosition browser); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for src/state/sequencer.rs + src/state/typed_tx.rs + src/state/q_state.rs + src/state/mod.rs + src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs + experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (lean_market.rs outside trust root by TB-10 precedent). Halting triggers (architect §7) NONE triggered: CTF conservation passes (Gemini Q1+Q4); position-tx field derivation exact (position_fields_derived_from_source_tx_exactly test PASS); NodePosition NOT counted as Coin (4-holding model unchanged); replay deterministic (sg_12_5 PASS); no Codex/Gemini VETO. Production claim: "TB-12 establishes a flat, immutable, non-monetary NodePositionsIndex anchoring WorkTx.stake → FirstLong + ChallengeTx.stake → ChallengeShort exposure records on canonical L4-derived QState. NodePosition is exposure record NOT active position balance per architect §10 critical insight; TB-13 CompleteSet introduces real YES/NO claims; TB-14 PriceIndex computes price from long/short interest; TB-16 controlled-arena introduces P&L. Charter Q6 (ii.5) sync mode honored — dual audit complete + user-architect ultrathink verdict before SHIP." Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): TB-13 prerequisite quarantine of src/prediction_market.rs legacy f64 CPMM (OBS-tracked); system_keypair persistence + reattachment factory for lean_market tick on-chain emission; real-LLM zeta-regularization rerun (Atom 0.5(a) wired the call site; manual user-driven session post-ship).

tick is POLICY PREVIEW MODE per architecture limitation) + P3:G4 (evaluator forced-exhaust real-LLM call site WIRED in Atom 0.5(a); actual real-LLM smoke deferred to manual post-audit session) + P4:1 (first chain-resident exposure record per accepted WorkTx + ChallengeTx with stake>0; FR-12.1 + FR-12.2) + P4:2 (immutable exposure record discipline; NO close/settle/transfer/mark-to-market dispatch arms — architect §10) + P4:3 (second-source-of-truth prevention via flat NodePositionsIndex; NO NodeMarketEntry as canonical state — architect §3 ruling; SG-12.8 test PASS)	P3:1 (no post-init mint — NodePosition is index entry, not money; assert_no_post_init_mint passes for every TB-12 typed_tx submission) + P3:2 (no stake-less write — accepted WorkTx with stake==0 rejected upstream by TB-3 StakeInsufficient gate; the additional `if work.stake.micro_units() > 0` gate in NodePosition write is defense-in-depth) + P3:3 (no payout from positions — TB-12 has no settle/payout path; FinalizeReward unchanged from TB-8) + P3:4 (no agent-self-reported reward — NodePosition derived sequencer-side; no agent surface; SG-12.6 dashboard test verifies render is read-only projection) + P3:5 (no full payout pre-challenge-window — TB-8 invariant unchanged; TB-12 doesn't introduce settlement) + P4:4 (NodePosition.amount NOT in total_supply_micro — CR-12.2 verified via SG-12.4 assert_total_ctf_conserved with empty exempt list)	[759/0/150 PASS @ <TB-12 ship commit>; SG-12.7 + SG-12.8 alias kept) +1 src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs binary unit test (sg_12_6_dashboard_view_positions_works covering 4 render cases + forbidden-token grep)	architect §9.3 SG-12.1..8 100% (8/8 by EXACT names) — sg_12_1_accepted_worktx_creates_firstlong_position / sg_12_2_accepted_challengetx_creates_challengeshort_position / sg_12_3_verifytx_does_not_create_node_position / sg_12_4_node_positions_do_not_change_total_supply / sg_12_5_replay_reconstructs_node_positions / sg_12_6_dashboard_view_positions_works / sg_12_7_no_market_trading_variants_introduced / sg_12_8_no_node_market_entry_as_canonical_state ALL PASS	Art.0.2 (Tape Canonical: NodePosition canonical-encoded; Q-projection deterministic from typed-tx fields with no env input) + Art.I.1 (5-step compile loop: accept-side derives exposure record additively; predicate outcome unchanged) + Art.III.4 (no fake accepted preserved — NodePosition is sequencer-derived, not agent-claimed; CR-12.3) + Art.V.1.3 (Anti-Oreo: NodePosition is sequencer-derived from typed-tx fields; no agent-callable surface; lean_market view-positions is read-only) + WP-§5.L4 (canonical state derived from L4 walk; replay deterministic per sg_12_5) + WP-§14.1 (no new typed_tx variant; pure side-effect on existing WorkTx + ChallengeTx accept arms) + WP-§19 (RSP-2 / RSP-3 substrate — work / challenge stake now leaves chain-resident exposure trail) + feedback_o1_chain_on_auditability (state facts → L4 anchor → derived index in QState) + feedback_kolmogorov_compression (architect ruling lossless archive) + feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite (additive 11th sub-field on EconomicState; ultrathink fixes done BEFORE ship not as post-ship patch) + feedback_dual_audit (Class 3 dual; Codex CHALLENGE×2 + Gemini PASS; conservative-verdict-wins applied) + feedback_iteration_cap_24h (production wire-up exception 72h; Architectural deltas: NEW src/state/typed_tx.rs (NodePosition struct + PositionSide enum + PositionKind enum); EXTEND src/state/q_state.rs (NodePositionsIndex flat shape + EconomicState 10→11 sub-fields with +node_positions_t serde-default); EXTEND src/state/sequencer.rs (WorkTx + ChallengeTx accept-arm pure-additive NodePosition write — no balances_t / stakes_t / challenge_cases_t / total_supply mutation; CR-12.1 + CR-12.2 verified); EXTEND src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs (NodePosition NOT in 4-holding total_supply_micro; structural — assert_total_ctf_conserved unchanged); EXTEND src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (§13 Node exposure records + render_section_13 pure-fn helper for SG-12.6 unit-testability + LABEL DISCIPLINE "exposure records" NOT "Open market balances" per architect §8 Atom 4); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (TB-11 G3/G4 carry-forward — 4 EvidenceCapsule counters + write_evidence_capsule + tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run wired at MAX_TX exhausted exit point); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/lean_market.rs (3 new subcommands: tick POLICY PREVIEW MODE — actual emission deferred to system_keypair persistence + view-bankruptcy read-only listing + view-positions read-only NodePosition browser); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for src/state/sequencer.rs + src/state/typed_tx.rs + src/state/q_state.rs + src/state/mod.rs + src/bin/aut runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R3.md:5626:    14	- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R3.md:5634:    63	| `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` Rust→Python wrapper (A8e2 fix G1) | `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` | A8 round-2 audit (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1): the round-robin conformance battery in `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` was only manual; tests that don't run automatically are documentation, not gates. handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R1.md:6448:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:45:# 2026-05-03 TB-15 SHIPPED — "P4 Information Loom (primary) + P5 MetaTape v0 prep: Lamarckian Autopsy + Markov EvidenceCapsule per architect 2026-05-02 + 2026-05-03 §6 verbatim spec (FR-15.1..6 + CR-15.1..6 + SG-15.1..8 + 6 halt triggers + forbidden list)". Class 2 envelope (self-audit; AgentVisibleProjection unchanged; only one new sequencer dispatch hook — TaskBankruptcyTx Step 3.5 + apply_one Stage 3.5). 7-atom plan (charter + halt fixture + AgentAutopsyCapsule schema/writer + AutopsyIndex/TaskBankruptcyTx wire-in + cluster_autopsies + MarkovEvidenceCapsule schema/generator + dashboard §15/first capsule/SHIP) all green. Auto-resolutions per feedback_architect_deviation_stance: A) single trigger site = TaskBankruptcyTx (SlashTx wires when RSP-3.2 ships; FinalizeReward loser branch wires when RSP-4 ships); B) EconomicState 12→13 sub-fields with +agent_autopsies_t serde-default; C) privacy default = AuditOnly (re-use TB-11 CapsulePrivacyPolicy); D) clustering threshold N=3 per architect §3.2.3 verbatim; E) LossReasonClass 8 variants incl Other(String); F) Markov override = env TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE=1; G) OBS_RESOLUTIONS_INDEX_TB15 DEFERRED out of TB-15 (TB-13 audit residue, not in architect §6 spec); H) Class 2 self-audit (no AgentVisibleProjection mod). cargo test --workspace = 870/0/150 PASS (+67 net vs TB-14 ship 803). All 6 halt-triggers GREEN: #1 raw_logs_not_in_general_read_view (Atom 3 file-scan AgentVisibleProjection) + #2 markov_capsule_references_constitution_hash (Atom 5 SG-15.7) + #3 autopsy_does_not_mutate_predicates (Atom 2 file-scan no &mut PredicateRegistry/ToolRegistry/RiskPolicyRegistry/register_*/unregister_*/patch_*; CR-15.3 + SG-15.8) + #4 private_detail_not_in_other_agent_view (Atom 3 file-scan AutopsyIndex value type Vec<Cid> not raw bytes; SG-15.2) + #5 typical_error_clustering_uses_summary_only (Atom 4 cluster_autopsies serialization scan no private_detail_cid byte run; CR-15.2 + SG-15.5) + #6 deep_history_read_without_override_fails (Atom 5 try_deep_history_read_with_override_check default-deny; SG-15.4 + FR-15.5). Architectural deltas: NEW src/runtime/autopsy_capsule.rs (LossReasonClass enum + AgentAutopsyCapsule struct + format_public_summary + write_autopsy_capsule + derive_autopsies_for_bankruptcy PURE deterministic helper + write_bankruptcy_autopsies_to_cas + cluster_autopsies + TypicalErrorSummary + AutopsyWriteError + 15 unit tests); NEW src/runtime/markov_capsule.rs (ObsId newtype + MarkovEvidenceCapsule struct + with_constitution_hash + try_deep_history_read_with_override_check + override_set_from_env + write_markov_capsule + scan_unresolved_obs + sha256_of_file + MarkovGenError + 8 unit tests); NEW src/bin/generate_markov_capsule.rs (CLI binary with --tb-id/--out-dir/--constitution-path/--cas-dir/--prev-cid-hex/--alignment-dir/--no-cas args + TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE env); NEW tests/tb_15_halt_triggers.rs (6 fixtures); MOD src/state/typed_tx.rs (+RiskRuleId opaque newtype); MOD src/bottom_white/cas/schema.rs (+4 ObjectType variants AgentAutopsyCapsule + AutopsyPrivateDetail + MarkovEvidenceCapsule + NextSessionContext); MOD src/state/q_state.rs (+AutopsyIndex(BTreeMap<EventId, Vec<Cid>>) newtype + agent_autopsies_t 13th sub-field on EconomicState serde-default; sub-field count assertion 12→13); MOD src/state/sequencer.rs (TaskBankruptcyTx dispatch arm Step 3.5 PURE deterministic Cid derivation + apply_one Stage 3.5 CAS write side-effect via deterministic helper; NO predicate registry mutation; NO AgentVisibleProjection mod; NO change to monetary invariants); MOD src/runtime/mod.rs (+pub mod autopsy_capsule + pub mod markov_capsule); MOD src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (+render_section_15 pure render with AUTOPSY IS PRIVATE banner + autopsy_event_counts + latest_markov_capsule_cid_hex fields on DashboardReport + read_latest_markov_pointer helper + 4 SG-15.6 dashboard render tests); MOD 4 test fixtures sub-field count 12→13 (economic_state_reconstruct/q_state_reconstruct/six_axioms_alignment); MOD tests/fc_alignment_conformance.rs (+4 TB-15 witnesses FC1-N32 write_autopsy_capsule + FC1-N33 derive_autopsies_for_bankruptcy + FC2-N30 cluster_autopsies + FC3-N43 MarkovEvidenceCapsule); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for 6 modified files (src/runtime/mod.rs ×2 hops Atom2→Atom5; src/state/q_state.rs Atom3; src/state/typed_tx.rs Atom2; src/state/sequencer.rs Atom3; src/bottom_white/cas/schema.rs Atom2; tests/fc_alignment_conformance.rs Atom6). First Markov capsule emitted (capsule_id b244f16a1f3bd532d041a40fe39b2b7e7cc12fb58e18b61aedd76a8010eeb1b6) with constitution_hash eec695459c71fbef3685583485deb431fe3b561657b2f285b7c5e7e220e59e03; evidence at handover/evidence/tb_15_markov_capsule_2026-05-03/. Production claim: "TB-15 establishes Lamarckian Autopsy + Markov EvidenceCapsule substrate. AgentAutopsyCapsule (per-agent, per-event, AuditOnly) records loss/bankruptcy events derived deterministically from ChainTape evidence — NEVER LLM self-narration. agent_autopsies_t lives sequencer-side (NOT projected to AgentVisibleProjection per CR-15.1 + halt-trigger #1). TypicalErrorBroadcast clustering at N≥3 emits public_summary text + Cids only — NEVER private_detail_cid bytes. MarkovEvidenceCapsule binds constitution_hash + L4 + L4.E + CAS roots + previous capsule + typical_errors + unresolved_obs as next-session bootstrap default; deeper history requires TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE=1. CR-15.3/15.4 STRUCTURALLY ENFORCED via writer signature + halt-trigger #3 file-scan. Constitutional alignment: Art.II.1 + Art.III.1 + Art.III.2 + Art.III.3 + Art.III.4 + Art.V.1 + Art.0.2." Open follow-ups (carry-forward NOT ship blockers): multi-site autopsy wire-in (SlashLoss/ChallengeUnsuccessful/VerifierBondLost — when RSP-3.2/RSP-4 ship); L4/L4.E/CAS root chain-readers in Markov generator (currently zero placeholders); CAS-walking dashboard §15 (currently empty autopsy_event_counts); InitAI agent-side honoring of Markov default (P5 v1); OBS_RESOLUTIONS_INDEX_TB15 explicitly deferred per charter §7-G.

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:3676:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R4.md:2973:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R3.md:2385:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:39:# 2026-05-03 TB-12 SHIPPED — "P3 carry-forward + P4 primary: Node Exposure Index per architect 2026-05-03 ruling §3 + §10". Class 3 envelope (Atom 1 = Class 2 schema; Atom 2 = Class 3 dispatch wire; Atom 6 = Class 3 dual audit Codex + Gemini both ✓). Self-audit PASS; Codex CHALLENGE × 2 (Q4 doc-drift on 4-vs-5-holding total_supply; Q5 legacy CPMM in src/prediction_market.rs predates TB-12) — both resolved as documentation/scope clarifications via recursive audit §10 + OBS_TB_12_LEGACY_CPMM_QUARANTINE_2026-05-03.md (TB-13 prerequisite); Gemini round-1 PASS / high conviction / PROCEED to SHIP (gemini-2.5-pro, 896k char prompt, 48.2s API; 8/8 audit questions PASS). User-architect ultrathink verified architect §9 strict alignment before SHIP — found 4 SG-12.x test-name drifts (SG-12.5 / 12.6 / 12.7 / 12.8 names didn't exactly match architect's "passes" strings); all 4 fixed BEFORE SHIP per feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite (NOT post-ship patch): SG-12.5 renamed to sg_12_5_replay_reconstructs_node_positions; SG-12.6 ADDED sg_12_6_dashboard_view_positions_works inside src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs #[cfg(test)] mod tb12_render_tests with 4 cases + forbidden-token grep; SG-12.7 renamed to sg_12_7_no_market_trading_variants_introduced; SG-12.8 ADDED sg_12_8_no_node_market_entry_as_canonical_state at integration-test level (q_state.rs unit alias kept as defense-in-depth). 8/8 SG-12.x by architect §9.3 EXACT names PASS. cargo test --workspace = 759/0/150 (+12 net vs TB-11 ship 747; +28 vs TB-10 ship 731). Architectural deltas: NEW src/state/typed_tx.rs (NodePosition struct + PositionSide enum + PositionKind enum); EXTEND src/state/q_state.rs (NodePositionsIndex flat shape + EconomicState 10→11 sub-fields with +node_positions_t serde-default); EXTEND src/state/sequencer.rs (WorkTx + ChallengeTx accept-arm pure-additive NodePosition write — no balances_t / stakes_t / challenge_cases_t / total_supply mutation; CR-12.1 + CR-12.2 verified); EXTEND src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs (NodePosition NOT in 4-holding total_supply_micro; structural — assert_total_ctf_conserved unchanged); EXTEND src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (§13 Node exposure records + render_section_13 pure-fn helper for SG-12.6 unit-testability + LABEL DISCIPLINE "exposure records" NOT "Open market balances" per architect §8 Atom 4); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (TB-11 G3/G4 carry-forward — 4 EvidenceCapsule counters + write_evidence_capsule + tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run wired at MAX_TX exhausted exit point); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/lean_market.rs (3 new subcommands: tick POLICY PREVIEW MODE — actual emission deferred to system_keypair persistence + view-bankruptcy read-only listing + view-positions read-only NodePosition browser); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for src/state/sequencer.rs + src/state/typed_tx.rs + src/state/q_state.rs + src/state/mod.rs + src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs + experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (lean_market.rs outside trust root by TB-10 precedent). Halting triggers (architect §7) NONE triggered: CTF conservation passes (Gemini Q1+Q4); position-tx field derivation exact (position_fields_derived_from_source_tx_exactly test PASS); NodePosition NOT counted as Coin (4-holding model unchanged); replay deterministic (sg_12_5 PASS); no Codex/Gemini VETO. Production claim: "TB-12 establishes a flat, immutable, non-monetary NodePositionsIndex anchoring WorkTx.stake → FirstLong + ChallengeTx.stake → ChallengeShort exposure records on canonical L4-derived QState. NodePosition is exposure record NOT active position balance per architect §10 critical insight; TB-13 CompleteSet introduces real YES/NO claims; TB-14 PriceIndex computes price from long/short interest; TB-16 controlled-arena introduces P&L. Charter Q6 (ii.5) sync mode honored — dual audit complete + user-architect ultrathink verdict before SHIP." Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): TB-13 prerequisite quarantine of src/prediction_market.rs legacy f64 CPMM (OBS-tracked); system_keypair persistence + reattachment factory for lean_market tick on-chain emission; real-LLM zeta-regularization rerun (Atom 0.5(a) wired the call site; manual user-driven session post-ship).

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:4373:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R4.md:12766:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:88:- **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1, hardened by A8e3 H6): `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` — Rust integration test that shells to `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` + asserts exit 0 + checks for the unittest "OK" trailer. Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:4485:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R4.md:12879:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R4.md.raw:1487:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2.md:4062:**Q3 (outcome match)**: Can Redeem with `outcome=Yes` and a Bankrupt-task resolution_ref bypass the outcome check? Sequencer must reject with `InvalidResolutionRef` when state-vs-outcome mismatch. Test: `sg_13_6` includes 2 mismatch checks (Finalized+No rejected; Bankrupt+Yes rejected). Also: `redeem.outcome != redeem.resolution_ref.claimed_outcome` is a separate gate that fires before state lookup — defense-in-depth.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:4600:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:12859:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:21:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:4601:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:12860:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:22:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:4602:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:12871:handover/audits/A8_EXIT_PACKET_2026-04-26.md:143:- (Q2.a) `p_0 = 0.10` substitution wording: is `PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer_2026-04-25.md` § 2 + § 8 internally consistent + statistically correct (least-strict admissible; no Type-I inflation; substitution operative at any phase including Phase E)?
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:4603:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:12872:handover/audits/A8_EXIT_PACKET_2026-04-26.md:144:- (Q2.b) Re-calibration conditions in § 3 are PRE-REQUISITES for calibration to run, not guarantees that calibration completes before any specific phase. Is this framed correctly without claiming calibration MUST run before Phase E?
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5118:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:193:- (Q4.a) Spot-check: re-run `cargo test --workspace`; expect 265 PASS / 29 ignored / 0 failed.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5170:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:5437:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5171:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:5438:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5356:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:8941:handover/audits/A8_EXIT_PACKET_2026-04-26.md:153:- (Q4.a) Spot-check: re-run `cargo test --workspace`; expect 265 PASS / 29 ignored / 0 failed.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5363:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:8950:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:88:- **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1, hardened by A8e3 H6): `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` — Rust integration test that shells to `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` + asserts exit 0 + checks for the unittest "OK" trailer. Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5526:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:9113:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:5108:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5527:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:9114:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:5109:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5529:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:9116:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:5158:| `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` Rust→Python wrapper (A8e2 fix G1) | `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` | A8 round-2 audit (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1): the round-robin conformance battery in `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` was only manual; tests that don't run automatically are documentation, not gates. G1 wires the Python suite into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust integration test that shells to `python3` and asserts exit 0 + the unittest "OK" trailer. The V3L-27 mitigation (case C-027) is now a recurring conformance gate exercised on every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. | ✅ |

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R11.md:5525:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R11.md:5526:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R11.md:5575:| `tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` Rust→Python wrapper (A8e2 fix G1) | `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` | A8 round-2 audit (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1): the round-robin conformance battery in `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` was only manual; tests that don't run automatically are documentation, not gates. G1 wires the Python suite into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust integration test that shells to `python3` and asserts exit 0 + the unittest "OK" trailer. The V3L-27 mitigation (case C-027) is now a recurring conformance gate exercised on every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. | ✅ |

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_7R_SHIP_AUDIT_R2_2026-05-02.md:417:**VETO, HIGH conviction.** The implementation mostly routes the intended production paths correctly, and `cargo test --workspace` really passes **712 / 0 / 150**. But TB-7R ship evidence is not reproducible from committed ChainTape + CAS: the committed smoke dirs omit the git-backed `runtime_repo/.git` ledger and `cas/.git` blob stores while the README claims they are present at [README.md](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/handover/evidence/tb_7r_smoke_2026-05-02/README.md:192) and [README.md](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/handover/evidence/tb_7r_smoke_2026-05-02/README.md:194). Only `.turingos_cas_index.jsonl` is tracked for each CAS dir. A copied replay of committed `single_n1` regenerated an empty-chain dashboard, because missing git repos are initialized as empty by [transition_ledger.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/src/bottom_white/ledger/transition_ledger.rs:659) and [transition_ledger.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/src/bottom_white/ledger/transition_ledger.rs:663). That violates acceptance clause 4 and ship condition #5.

The new executable coverage includes the 6 parent_tx conformance tests at [tb_7r_parent_tx_conformance.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/tests/tb_7r_parent_tx_conformance.rs:189), plus new gate/genesis/CAS/VR/telemetry/replay tests.

handover/audits/STAGE_AUDIT_TB_1_TO_TB_5_2026-05-01.md:136:All 8 claims are demonstrated by `cargo test --workspace` (617/617). None are demonstrated by any LLM-driven production run.
handover/audits/STAGE_AUDIT_TB_1_TO_TB_5_2026-05-01.md:142:**TB-1..TB-5 stage gate**: kernel-side structural progress is genuine and substantively defensible at the test-harness level. The 5 production claims above hold under `cargo test --workspace` audit.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_7R_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-02.md:3:**VETO, HIGH conviction.** The implementation mostly routes the intended production paths correctly, and `cargo test --workspace` really passes **712 / 0 / 150**. But TB-7R ship evidence is not reproducible from committed ChainTape + CAS: the committed smoke dirs omit the git-backed `runtime_repo/.git` ledger and `cas/.git` blob stores while the README claims they are present at [README.md](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/handover/evidence/tb_7r_smoke_2026-05-02/README.md:192) and [README.md](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/handover/evidence/tb_7r_smoke_2026-05-02/README.md:194). Only `.turingos_cas_index.jsonl` is tracked for each CAS dir. A copied replay of committed `single_n1` regenerated an empty-chain dashboard, because missing git repos are initialized as empty by [transition_ledger.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/src/bottom_white/ledger/transition_ledger.rs:659) and [transition_ledger.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/src/bottom_white/ledger/transition_ledger.rs:663). That violates acceptance clause 4 and ship condition #5.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_7R_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-02.md:23:**Q9: PASS.** Re-ran canonical `cargo test --workspace`: **712 passed, 0 failed, 150 ignored**. The TB-7R range adds no `#[ignore]` annotations. The new executable coverage includes the 6 parent_tx conformance tests at [tb_7r_parent_tx_conformance.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/tests/tb_7r_parent_tx_conformance.rs:189), plus new gate/genesis/CAS/VR/telemetry/replay tests.
